     } catch (\\Illuminate\\Validation\\ValidationException $e) {\n424\t            return $this->handleValidationError($e);\n425\t        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n426\t            Log::error('Profile update error: ' . $e->getMessage());\n427\t            return response()->json([\n428\t                'message' => 'An unexpected error occurred while updating your profile.',\n429\t                'error' => $e->getMessage()\n430\t            ], 500);\n431\t        }\n432\t    }\n433\t\n434\t    /**\n435\t     * Change user role with specific permissions.\n436\t     */\n437\t    public function changeUserRole(Request $request, $userID)\n438\t    {\n439\t        try {\n440\t            $authUser = Auth::user();\n441\t            if (!$authUser) {\n442\t                return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthenticated'], 401);\n443\t            }\n444\t\n445\t            // Validate role change permission\n446\t            if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [3, 4, 5])) {\n447\t                return response()->json([\n448\t                    'message' => 'Unauthorized: Only Dean, Associate Dean, or Program Chair can change user roles'\n449\t                ], 403);\n450\t            }\n451\t\n452\t            // Validate request data\n453\t            $validated = $request->validate([\n454\t                'roleID' => 'required|integer|exists:roles,roleID'\n455\t            ]);\n456\t\n457\t            // Get target user\n458\t            $user = User::findOrFail($userID);\n459\t\n460\t            // Role hierarchy restrictions\n461\t            if ($authUser->roleID === 3) { // Program Chair\n462\t                // Program Chair cannot edit Associate Dean (5) or Dean (4)\n463\t                if ($user->roleID >= 4) {\n464\t                    return response()->json([\n465\t                        'message' => 'Program Chair cannot modify roles of Associate Dean or Dean'\n466\t                    ], 403);\n467\t                }\n468\t                // Can only edit users in their program\n469\t                if ($user->programID !== $authUser->programID) {\n470\t                    return response()->json([\n471\t                        'message' => 'You can only change roles of users within your program'\n472\t                    ], 403);\n473\t                }\n474\t            } elseif ($authUser->roleID === 5) { // Associate Dean\n475\t                // Associate Dean cannot edit Dean (4)\n476\t                if ($user->roleID === 4) {\n477\t                    return response()->json([\n478\t                        'message' => 'Associate Dean cannot modify Dean\\'s role'\n479\t                    ], 403);\n480\t                }\n481\t                // Can only edit users in their campus\n482\t                if ($user->campusID !== $authUser->campusID) {\n483\t                    return response()->json([\n484\t                        'message' => 'You can only change roles of users within your campus'\n485\t                    ], 403);\n486\t                }\n487\t            }\n488\t            // Dean (roleID 4) can edit everyone, no restrictions needed\n489\t\n490\t            // Validate role change scope\n491\t            $allowedRoleChanges = $this->getAllowedRoleChanges($authUser->roleID);\n492\t            if (!in_array($validated['roleID'], $allowedRoleChanges)) {\n493\t                return response()->json([\n494\t                    'message' => 'You are not authorized to assign this role'\n495\t                ], 403);\n496\t            }\n497\t\n498\t            // Update the role\n499\t            $user->roleID = $validated['roleID'];\n500\t            $user->save();\n501\t\n502\t            return response()->json([\n503\t                'message' => 'User role updated successfully',\n504\t                'user' => $user\n505\t            ], 200);\n506\t\n507\t        } catch (\\Illuminate\\Validation\\ValidationException $e) {\n508\t            return response()->json([\n509\t                'message' => 'Validation failed',\n510\t                'errors' => $e->errors()\n511\t            ], 422);\n512\t        } catch (\\Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\ModelNotFoundException $e) {\n513\t            return response()->json([\n514\t                'message' => 'User not found'\n515\t            ], 404);\n516\t        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n517\t            Log::error('Role change error: ' . $e->getMessage());\n518\t            return response()->json([\n519\t                'message' => 'An unexpected error occurred while changing the user role',\n520\t                'error' => $e->getMessage()\n521\t            ], 500);\n522\t        }\n523\t    }\n524\t\n525\t    /**\n526\t     * Delete a specific user (Only Dean and Associate Dean).\n527\t     */\n528\t    public function deleteUser($id)\n529\t    {\n530\t        $authUser = Auth::user();\n531\t        if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [4, 5])) {\n532\t            return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthorized: Only the Dean or Associate Dean can delete users'], 403);\n533\t        }\n534\t        $user = User::find($id);\n535\t        if (!$user) {\n536\t            return response()->json(['message' => 'User not found'], 404);\n537\t        }\n538\t        $user->delete();\n539\t        return response()->json(['message' => 'User deleted successfully'], 200);\n540\t    }\n541\t\n542\t    /**\n543\t     * Delete multiple users (Only Dean and Associate Dean).\n544\t     */\n545\t    public function deleteMultipleUsers(Request $request)\n546\t    {\n547\t        $authUser = Auth::user();\n548\t        if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [4, 5])) {\n549\t            return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthorized: Only the Dean or Associate Dean can delete users'], 403);\n550\t        }\n551\t        $validated = $request->validate([\n552\t            'userIDs' => 'required|array',\n553\t            'userIDs.*' => 'integer|exists:users,userID'\n554\t        ]);\n555\t        $deleted = [];\n556\t        foreach ($validated['userIDs'] as $userID) {\n557\t            $user = User::find($userID);\n558\t            if ($user) {\n559\t                $user->delete();\n560\t                $deleted[] = $userID;\n561\t            }\n562\t        }\n563\t        return response()->json([\n564\t            'message' => 'Selected users deleted successfully.',\n565\t            'deleted_users' => $deleted\n566\t        ], 200);\n567\t    }\n568\t\n569\t    // Private helper methods\n570\t\n571\t    private function authorizeDeanAccess()\n572\t    {\n573\t        $authUser = Auth::user();\n574\t        abort_unless($authUser && in_array($authUser->roleID, [4, 5]), 403, 'Unauthorized: Only the Dean or Associate Dean can perform this action');\n575\t    }\n576\t\n577\t    private function buildUserQuery(Request $request)\n578\t    {\n579\t        $query = User::with(['role', 'campus', 'program', 'status', 'student']);\n580\t        $user = Auth::user();\n581\t\n582\t        // Apply role-based filters\n583\t        if ($user->roleID === 5) {\n584\t            // Associate Dean can only view users from their campus\n585\t            if ($user->campusID) {\n586\t                $query->where('campusID', $user->campusID);\n587\t            } else {\n588\t                Log::warning(\"Associate Dean {$user->userID} has no campus assigned\");\n589\t                $query->where('campusID', 0); // This will return no results\n590\t            }\n591\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 3) {\n592\t            // Program Chair can only view users from their campus and program\n593\t            if ($user->campusID && $user->programID) {\n594\t                $query->where('campusID', $user->campusID)\n595\t                      ->where('programID', $user->programID);\n596\t            } else {\n597\t                Log::warning(\"Program Chair {$user->userID} has missing campus or program assignment\");\n598\t                $query->where('campusID', 0); // This will return no results\n599\t            }\n600\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 2) {\n601\t            // Faculty can only view students from their campus and program\n602\t            if ($user->campusID && $user->programID) {\n603\t                $query->where('campusID', $user->campusID)\n604\t                      ->where('programID', $user->programID)\n605\t                      ->where('roleID', 1); // Only show students (roleID 1)\n606\t            } else {\n607\t                Log::warning(\"Faculty {$user->userID} has missing campus or program assignment\");\n608\t                $query->where('campusID', 0); // This will return no results\n609\t            }\n610\t        }\n611\t        // Dean (roleID 4) can view all users, so no additional filters needed\n612\t\n613\t        $this->applyDefaultStateVisibility($query, $request);\n614\t        $this->applySearchFilters($query, $request);\n615\t        return $query;\n616\t    }\n617\t\n618\t    private function applyDefaultStateVisibility($query, Request $request)\n619\t    {\n620\t        $state = strtolower(trim((string) $request->input('state', '')));\n621\t        $status = strtolower(trim((string) $request->input('status', '')));\n622\t\n623\t        // If state or status is explicitly provided, use that filter\n624\t        // Also return early for non-default statuses so they bypass the default registered-only filter\n625\t        if (in_array($state, ['active', 'inactive', 'all'], true)\n626\t            || in_array($status, ['pending', 'registered', 'disapproved'], true)) {\n627\t            return;\n628\t        }\n629\t\n630\t        // Default: show only active registered users\n631\t        $query->where(function ($q) {\n632\t            $q->where('isActive', true)\n633\t              ->whereHas('status', function ($statusQuery) {\n634\t                  $statusQuery->where('name', 'registered');\n635\t              });\n636\t        });\n637\t    }\n638\t\n639\t    private function applySearchFilters($query, Request $request)\n640\t    {\n641\t        $filters = [\n642\t            'search' => function($q, $value) {\n643\t                $q->where(function($q) use ($value) {\n644\t                    $q->where('firstName', 'like', \"%{$value}%\")\n645\t                      ->orWhere('lastName', 'like', \"%{$value}%\")\n646\t                      ->orWhere('email', 'like', \"%{$value}%\")\n647\t                      ->orWhere('userCode', 'like', \"%{$value}%\");\n648\t                });\n649\t            },\n650\t            'status' => function($q, $value) {\n651\t                if ($value && $value !== 'all') {\n652\t                    $q->whereHas('status', function($q) use ($value) {\n653\t                        $q->where('name', $value);\n654\t                    });\n655\t                }\n656\t            },\n657\t            'campus' => function($q, $value) {\n658\t                $q->whereHas('campus', function($q) use ($value) {\n659\t                    $q->where('campusName', $value);\n660\t                });\n661\t            },\n662\t            'role' => function($q, $value) {\n663\t                $q->whereHas('role', function($q) use ($value) {\n664\t                    $q->where('roleName', $value);\n665\t                });\n666\t            },\n667\t            'position' => function($q, $value) {\n668\t                $q->whereHas('role', function($q) use ($value) {\n669\t                    $q->where('roleName', $value);\n670\t                });\n671\t            },\n672\t            'program' => function($q, $value) {\n673\t                $q->whereHas('program', function($q) use ($value) {\n674\t                    $q->where('programName', $value);\n675\t                });\n676\t            },\n677\t            'state' => function($q, $value) {\n678\t                $normalizedValue = strtolower(trim((string) $value));\n679\t\n680\t                if ($normalizedValue === 'all' || $normalizedValue === '') {\n681\t                    return;\n682\t                }\n683\t\n684\t                if ($normalizedValue === 'active') {\n685\t                    $q->where('isActive', true)\n686\t                      ->whereHas('status', function ($statusQuery) {\n687\t                          $statusQuery->where('name', 'registered');\n688\t                      });\n689\t                    return;\n690\t                }\n691\t\n692\t                if ($normalizedValue === 'inactive') {\n693\t                    $q->where('isActive', false)\n694\t                      ->whereHas('status', function ($statusQuery) {\n695\t                          $statusQuery->where('name', 'registered');\n696\t                      });\n697\t                }\n698\t            }\n699\t        ];\n700\t\n701\t        foreach ($filters as $key => $callback) {\n702\t            if ($value = $request->input($key)) {\n703\t                $callback($query, $value);\n704\t            }\n705\t        }\n706\t    }\n707\t\n708\t    private function paginateResults($query, Request $request)\n709\t    {\n710\t        $perPage = min((int)$request->input('limit', 20), 100); // Default 20, max 100\n711\t        $page = max((int)$request->input('page', 1), 1);\n712\t        $total = $query->count();\n713\t\n714\t        $users = $query->orderBy('userID', 'desc')\n715\t                      ->skip(($page - 1) * $perPage)\n716\t                      ->take($perPage)\n717\t                      ->get()\n718\t                      ->map(function ($user) {\n719\t                          // Fetch remarks and curriculum for students\n720\t                          $remarks = null;\n721\t                          $curriculum = null;\n722\t                          if ($user->roleID == 1) {\n723\t                              $remarksRow = \\DB::table('student_remarks')\n724\t                                  ->join('remarks', 'student_remarks.remarksID', '=', 'remarks.id')\n725\t                                  ->where('student_remarks.userID', $user->userID)\n726\t                                  ->select('remarks.remarksType')\n727\t                                  ->first();\n728\t                              $remarks = $remarksRow ? $remarksRow->remarksType : null;\n729\t                              $curriculumRow = \\DB::table('student_curricula')\n730\t                                  ->join('curriculum', 'student_curricula.curriculumID', '=', 'curriculum.id')\n731\t                                  ->where('student_curricula.userID', $user->userID)\n732\t                                  ->select('curriculum.curriculumType')\n733\t                                  ->first();\n734\t                              $curriculum = $curriculumRow ? $curriculumRow->curriculumType : null;\n735\t                          }\n736\t                          return [\n737\t                              'userID' => $user->userID,\n738\t                              'userCode' => $user->userCode,\n739\t                              'firstName' => $user->firstName,\n740\t                              'lastName' => $user->lastName,\n741\t                              'email' => $user->email,\n742\t                              'roleID' => $user->roleID,\n743\t                              'campusID' => $user->campusID,\n744\t                              'programID' => $user->programID,\n745\t                              'role' => $user->role ? $user->role->roleName : const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n203\t\n204\t    if (!token) {\n205\t      setError(\"No token found, please log in.\");\n206\t      setLoading(false);\n207\t      setSearchLoading(false);\n208\t      setTabLoading(false);\n209\t      return;\n210\t    }\n211\t\n212\t    try {\n213\t      // Build query parameters\n214\t      const queryParams = new URLSearchParams({\n215\t        page: page,\n216\t        limit: itemsPerPage,\n217\t        search: debouncedSearchQuery,\n218\t        status: statusFilter,\n219\t        campus: campusFilter,\n220\t        role: roleFilter,\n221\t        position: positionFilter,\n222\t        program: programFilter,\n223\t        state: stateFilter,\n224\t        remarks: remarksFilter,\n225\t        userType: studentsOnly ? \"students\" : \"others\", // Add user type filter\n226\t      });\n227\t\n228\t      const response = await fetch(\n229\t        `${apiUrl}/users?${queryParams.toString()}`,\n230\t        {\n231\t          method: \"GET\",\n232\t          headers: {\n233\t            \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n234\t            Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n235\t          },\n236\t        },\n237\t      );\n238\t\n239\t      if (response.status === 401) {\n240\t        setError(\"Session expired, please log in again.\");\n241\t        return;\n242\t      }\n243\t\n244\t      if (response.status === 403) {\n245\t        setError(\"You don't have permission to access this page.\");\n246\t        return;\n247\t      }\n248\t\n249\t      if (!response.ok) {\n250\t        throw new Error(\"Failed to fetch users\");\n251\t      }\n252\t\n253\t      const data = await response.json();\n254\t      setUsers(data.users);\n255\t      setTotalPages(Math.ceil(data.total / itemsPerPage));\n256\t      setTotalUsers(data.total);\n257\t      setCurrentPage(page);\n258\t    } catch (error) {\n259\t      setError(error.message);\n260\t      showToast(\"Failed to fetch users. Please try again.\", \"error\");\n261\t    } finally {\n262\t      setLoading(false);\n263\t      setSearchLoading(false);\n264\t      setTabLoading(false);\n265\t    }\n266\t  };\n267\t\n268\t  // Update useEffect to refetch when filters change\n269\t  useEffect(() => {\n270\t    fetchUsers(1); // Reset to first page when filters change\n271\t  }, [\n272\t    debouncedSearchQuery,\n273\t    statusFilter,\n274\t    campusFilter,\n275\t    roleFilter,\n276\t    positionFilter,\n277\t    programFilter,\n278\t    stateFilter,\n279\t    remarksFilter,\n280\t    studentsOnly, // Add studentsOnly to dependencies\n281\t  ]);\n282\t\n283\t  // Function to handle user selection via checkbox\n284\t  const handleCheckboxChange = (userID) => {\n285\t    setSelectedUsers((prevSelected) =>\n286\t      prevSelected.includes(userID)\n287\t        ? prevSelected.filter((id) => id !== userID)\n288\t        : [...prevSelected, userID],\n289\t    );\n290\t  };\n291\t\n292\t  // Remove all local filtering since it's now handled by the backend\n293\t  const pendingUsersCount = users.filter(\n294\t    (user) => user.status === \"pending\",\n295\t  ).length;\n296\t\n297\t  const handleSearchChange = (e) => {\n298\t    setSearchTerm(e.target.value); // Update the search term\n299\t  };\n300\t\n301\t  // Function to approve a single user\n302\t  const handleApproveUser = async (userID) => {\n303\t    const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n304\t    setIsApproving(true);\n305\t    try {\n306\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/${userID}/approve`, {\n307\t        method: \"PATCH\",\n308\t        headers: {\n309\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n310\t          Accept: \"application/json\",\n311\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n312\t        },\n313\t      });\n314\t\n315\t      if (!response.ok) {\n316\t        const errorData = await response.json();\n317\t        throw new Error(errorData.message || \"Failed to approve user\");\n318\t      }\n319\t      showToast(\"User approved successfully!\", \"success\");\n320\t\n321\t      setUsers(\n322\t        users.map((user) =>\n323\t          user.userID === userID ? { ...user, status: \"registered\" } : user,\n324\t        ),\n325\t      );\n326\t      setUsers(\n327\t        users.map((user) =>\n328\t          user.userID === userID ? { ...user, isActve: true } : user,\n329\t        ),\n330\t      );\n331\t      fetchUsers();\n332\t      setShowModal(false);\n333\t    } catch (error) {\n334\t      console.error(\"Error approving user:\", error);\n335\t      showToast(\"Failed to approve user. Please try again.\", \"error\");\n336\t    } finally {\n337\t      setIsApproving(false);\n338\t    }\n339\t  };\n340\t\n341\t  // Function to activate a single user\n342\t  const handleActivateUser = async (userID) => {\n343\t    const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n344\t    setIsActivating(true);\n345\t    try {\n346\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/${userID}/activate`, {\n347\t        method: \"PATCH\",\n348\t        headers: {\n349\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n350\t          Accept: \"application/json\",\n351\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n352\t        },\n353\t      });\n354\t\n355\t      if (!response.ok) {\n356\t        const errorData = await response.json();\n357\t        throw new Error(errorData.message || \"Failed to activate user\");\n358\t      }\n359\t\n360\t      showToast(\"User activated successfully!\", \"success\");\n361\t\n362\t      setUsers(\n363\t        users.map((user) =>\n364\t          user.userID === userID ? { ...user, isActive: true } : user,\n365\t        ),\n366\t      );\n367\t      setShowModal(false);\n368\t    } catch (error) {\n369\t      showToast(\n370\t        error.message || \"Failed to activate user. Please try again.\",\n371\t        \"error\",\n372\t      );\n373\t    } finally {\n374\t      setIsActivating(false);\n375\t    }\n376\t  };\n377\t\n378\t  // Function to deactivate a single user\n379\t  const handleDeactivateUser = async (userID) => {\n380\t    const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n381\t    setIsDeactivating(true);\n382\t    try {\n383\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/${userID}/deactivate`, {\n384\t        method: \"PATCH\",\n385\t        headers: {\n386\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n387\t          Accept: \"application/json\",\n388\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n389\t        },\n390\t      });\n391\t\n392\t      if (!response.ok) {\n393\t        const errorData = await response.json();\n394\t        throw new Error(errorData.message || \"Failed to deactivate user\");\n395\t      }\n396\t      showToast(\"User deactivated successfully!\", \"success\");\n397\t\n398\t      setUsers((prevUsers) =>\n399\t        prevUsers.map((user) =>\n400\t          user.userID === userID ? { ...user, isActive: false } : user,\n401\t        ),\n402\t      );\n403\t      setShowModal(false);\n404\t    } catch (error) {\n405\t      console.error(\"Error deactivating user:\", error);\n406\t      showToast(\"Failed to deactivate user. Please try again.\", \"error\");\n407\t    } finally {\n408\t      setIsDeactivating(false);\n409\t    }\n410\t  };\n411\t\n412\t  // Function to approve multiple selected users\n413\t  const handleApproveSelectedUsers = async () => {\n414\t    const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n415\t    setIsApprovingMultiple(true);\n416\t    if (selectedUsers.length === 0) {\n417\t      showToast(\"Please select users to approve.\", \"error\");\n418\t      return;\n419\t    }\n420\t\n421\t    try {\n422\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/approve-multiple`, {\n423\t        method: \"POST\",\n424\t        headers: {\n425\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n426\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n427\t        },\n428\t        body: JSON.stringify({ userIDs: selectedUsers }), // assuming backend expects this shape\n429\t      });\n430\t\n431\t      if (!response.ok) {\n432\t        throw new Error(\"Failed to approve selected users.\");\n433\t      }\n434\t\n435\t      showToast(\"Users approved successfully!\", \"success\");\n436\t      fetchUsers();\n437\t      setSelectedUsers([]); // clear selection\n438\t    } catch (error) {\n439\t      console.error(error);\n440\t      showToast(\"Failed to approve selected users. Please try again.\", \"error\");\n441\t    } finally {\n442\t      setIsApprovingMultiple(false);\n443\t    }\n444\t  };\n445\t\n446\t  // Function to activate multiple selected users\n447\t  const handleActivateSelectedUsers = async () => {\n448\t    const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n449\t    setIsActivatingMultiple(true);\n450\t\n451\t    if (selectedUsers.length === 0) {\n452\t      showToast(\"Please select users to activate.\", \"error\");\n453\t      return;\n454\t    }\n455\t\n456\t    try {\n457\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/activate-multiple`, {\n458\t        method: \"POST\",\n459\t        headers: {\n460\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n461\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n462\t        },\n463\t        body: JSON.stringify({ userIDs: selectedUsers }),\n464\t      });\n465\t\n466\t      if (!response.ok) {\n467\t        throw new Error(\"Failed to activate selected users.\");\n468\t      }\n469\t\n470\t      fetchUsers();\n471\t      setSelectedUsers([]);\n472\t      showToast(\"Users activated successfully!\", \"success\");\n473\t    } catch (error) {\n474\t      console.error(error);\n475\t      showToast(\n476\t        \"Failed to activate selected users. Please try again.\",\n477\t        \"error\",\n478\t      );\n479\t    } finally {\n480\t      setIsActivatingMultiple(false);\n481\t    }\n482\t  };\n483\t\n484\t  // Function to deactivate multiple selected users\n485\t  const handleDeactivateSelectedUsers = async () => {\n486\t    const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n487\t    setIsDeactivatingMultiple(true);\n488\t\n489\t    if (selectedUsers.length === 0) {\n490\t      showToast(\"Please select users to deactivate.\", \"error\");\n491\t      return;\n492\t    }\n493\t\n494\t    try {\n495\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/deactivate-multiple`, {\n496\t        method: \"POST\",\n497\t        headers: {\n498\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n499\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n500\t        },\n501\t        body: JSON.stringify({ userIDs: selectedUsers }),\n502\t      });\n503\t\n504\t      if (!response.ok) {\n505\t        throw new Error(\"Failed to deactivate selected users.\");\n506\t      }\n507\t      showToast(\"Users deactivated successfully!\", \"success\");\n508\t      fetchUsers();\n509\t      setSelectedUsers([]);\n510\t    } catch (error) {\n511\t      console.error(error);\n512\t      showToast(\n513\t        \"Failed to deactivate selected users. Please try again.\",\n514\t        \"error\",\n515\t      );\n516\t    } finally {\n517\t      setIsDeactivatingMultiple(false);\n518\t    }\n519\t  };\n520\t\n521\t  // Function to handle bulk actions (approve/activate/deactivate)\n522\t  const handleActionClick = (action) => {\n523\t    if (selectedUsers.length === 0) {\n524\t      showToast(\"Please select at least one user first\", \"error\");\n525\t      return;\n526\t    }\n527\t\n528\t    switch (action) {\n529\t      case \"approve\":\n530\t        handleApproveSelectedUsers();\n531\t        break;\n532\t      case \"activate\":\n533\t        handleActivateSelectedUsers();\n534\t        break;\n535\t      case \"deactivate\":\n536\t        handleDeactivateSelectedUsers();\n537\t        break;\n538\t    }\n539\t    setDropdownOpen(false);\n540\t  };\n541\t\n542\t  // Function to handle page change\n543\t  const handlePageChange = (newPage) => {\n544\t    setLoading(true);\n545\t    fetchUsers(newPage);\n546\t  };\n547\t\n548\t  // Function to handle role update\n549\t  const handleRoleUpdate = async (userID, newRoleID) => {\n550\t    const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n551\t    setIsUpdatingRole(true);\n552\t    setRoleError(\"\"); // Clear any previous errors\n553\t    try {\n554\t      // Check if current user is trying to demote themselves from Dean\n555\t      const currentUser = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(\"user\"));\n556\t      if (\n557\t        currentUser.roleID === 4 &&\n558\t        userID === currentUser.userID &&\n559\t        newRoleID !== 4\n560\t      ) {\n561\t        if (otherDeansCount <= 1) {\n562\t          throw new Error(\n563\t            \"Cannot demote yourself. There must be at least one other Dean in the system.\",\n564\t          );\n565\t        }\n566\t      }\n567\t\n568\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/${userID}/role`, {\n569\t        method: \"PATCH\",\n570\t        headers: {\n571\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n572\t          Accept: \"application/json\",\n573\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n574\t        },\n575\t        body: JSON.stringify({ roleID: newRoleID }),\n576\t      });\n577\t\n578\t      if (!response.ok) {\n579\t        const errorData = await response.json();\n580\t        throw new Error(errorData.message || \"Failed to update user role\");\n581\t      }\n582\t\n583\t      const data = await response.json();\n584\t      showToast(data.message || \"User role updated successfully!\", \"success\");\n585\t\n586\t      // Update the user in the local state\n587\t      setUsers((prevUsers) =>\n588\t        prevUsers.map((user) =>\n589\t          user.userID === userID\n590\t            ? { ...user, roleID: newRoleID, role: data.user.role }\n591\t            : user,\n592\t        ),\n593\t      );\n594\t\n595\t      // Update the selected user in the modal\n596\t      setSelectedUser((prev) => ({\n597\t        ...prev,\n598\t        roleID: newRoleID,\n599\t        role: data.user.role,\n600\t      }));\n601\t\n602\t      // Refresh the user list\n603\t      fetchUsers(currentPage);\n604\t\n605\t      // Close the modal after successful update\n606\t      setShowModal(false);\n607\t      setRoleError(\"\");\n608\t    } catch (error) {\n609\t      console.error(\"Error updating user role:\", error);\n610\t      setRoleError(\n611\t        error.message || \"Failed to update user role. Please try again.\",\n612\t      );\n613\t    } finally {\n614\t      setIsUpdatingRole(false);\n615\t    }\n616\t  };\n617\t\n618\t  // Add delete user function\n619\t  const handleDeleteUser = async (userID) => {\n620\t    const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n621\t    const currentUser = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(\"user\"));\n622\t    if (currentUser && userID === currentUser.userID) {\n623\t      showToast(\"You can't delete your own account.\", \"error\");\n624\t      return;\n625\t    }\n626\t    if (!window.confirm(\"Are you sure you want to delete this user?\")) return;\n627\t    setIsDeleting(true);\n628\t    try {\n629\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/${userID}`, {\n630\t        method: \"DELETE\",\n631\t        headers: {\n632\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n633\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n634\t        },\n635\t      });\n636\t      if (!response.ok) {\n637\t        const errorData = await response.json();\n638\t        throw new Error(errorData.message || \"Failed to delete user\");\n639\t      }\n640\t      showToast(\"User deleted successfully!\", \"success\");\n641\t      fetchUsers(currentPage);\n642\t      setShowModal(false);\n643\t    } catch (error) {\n644\t      showToast(\n645\t        error.message || \"Failed to delete user. casing\n140\t      return remarks.trim();\n141\t    }\n142\t\n143\t    // Handle numeric ID values\n144\t    switch (remarks) {\n145\t      case 1:\n146\t        return \"Regular\";\n147\t      case case \"Regular\":\n162\t        return \"bg-green-100 text-green-700\";\n163\t      case \"Probationary\":\n164\t        return \"bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700\";\n165\t      case \"Advised to filteredUsers = users.filter((user) => user.roleID === 1);\n179\t    } else if (activeView === \"faculty\") {\n180\t      filteredUsers = users.filter((user) => user.roleID !== 1);\n181\t    } else if        );\n198\t      });\n199\t    }\n200\t\n201\t    // Filter by approval status if applied (Pending/Approved/Rejected)\n202\t    if (statusFilter && statusFilter !== \"all\") {\n203\t      filteredUsers = filteredUsers.filter(\n204\t        (user) => (user.status || \"\").toLowerCase().trim() === statusFilter,\n205\t      );\n206\t    }\n207\t\n208\t    // Filter by campus (OR logic - (user.campus || \"\").trim();\n212\t        return campusFilter.some((filterCampus) => {\n213\t          return userCampus === filterCampus.trim();\n214\t        });\n215\t      });\n216\t    }\n217\t\n218\t    // Filter by position (OR logic - user matches any selected position)\n219\t    if (Array.isArray(positionFilter) && positionFilter.length > 0) {\n220\t      filteredUsers = positionFilter.some((filterRole) => {\n224\t          // Handle case-insensitive comparison and trim whitespace\n225\t          const filterRoleTrimmed = filterRole.trim();\n226\t          return userRole === filterRoleTrimmed;\n227\t        });\n228\t        return matches;\n229\t      });\n230\t    }\n231\t\n232\t    // Filter by program (OR logic - user matches any selected program)\n233\t    if (Array.isArray(programFilter) && programFilter.length > 0) {\n234\t      filteredUsers = filteredUsers.filter((user) => {\n235\t        const userProgram = (user.program || \"\").trim();\n236\t        return programFilter.some((filterProgram) => {\n237\t          return userProgram === filterProgram.trim();\n238\t        });\n239\t      });\n240\t    }\n241\t\n242\t    // Filter by    const userState = user.isActive ? \"Active\" : \"Inactive\";\n246\t        return stateFilter.includes(userState);\n247\t      });\n248\t    }\n249\t\n250\t    return filteredUsers;\n251\t  };\n252\t\n253\t  const hasArrayFiltersActive = () => {\n254\t    return (\n255\t      (Array.isArray(campusFilter) && campusFilter.length > 0) ||\n256\t      (Array.isArray(positionFilter) && };\n261\t\n262\t  const getDisplayedUsers = () => {\n263\t    const filteredUsers = getFilteredUsers();\n264\t    if (!hasArrayFiltersActive()) return filteredUsers;\n265\t\n266\t    return Please try again.\", \"error\");\n687\t    } finally {\n688\t      setIsApprovingMultiple(false);\n689\t    }\n690\t  };\n691\t\n692\t  // Function to activate multiple selected users\n693\t  const handleActivateSelectedUsers = async () => {\n694\t    const token = sessionStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n695\t    setIsActivatingMultiple(true);\n696\t\n697\t    if (selectedUsers.length === 0) {\n698\t      showToast(\"Please select users to activate.\", \"error\");\n699\t      return;\n700\t    }\n701\t\n702\t    try {\n703\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/activate-multiple`, {\n704\t        method: \"POST\",\n705\t        headers: {\n706\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n707\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n708\t        },\n709\t        body: JSON.stringify({ userIDs: selectedUsers }),\n710\t      });\n711\t\n712\t      if (!response.ok) {\n713\t        throw new Error(\"Failed to activate selected users.\");\n714\t      }\n715\t\n716\t      fetchUsers();\n717\t      setSelectedUsers([]);\n718\t      showToast(\"Users activated successfully!\", \"success\");\n719\t    } catch (error) {\n720\t      console.error(error);\n721\t      showToast(\n722\t        \"Failed to activate selected users. Math.max(1, Math.ceil(filteredUsersCount / itemsPerPage))\n773\t      : totalPages;\n774\t\n775\t    if (newPage < 1 || newPage > effectiveTotalPages) return;\n776\t\n777\t    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n778\t\n779\t    if (isClientSidePagination) {\n780\t      setCurrentPage(newPage);\n781\t      return;\n782\t    }\n783\t\n784\t    setLoading(true);\n785\t    fetchUsers(newPage);\n786\t  };\n787\t\n788\t  // Function to handle role update\n789\t  const handleRoleUpdate = async (userID, newRoleID) => {\n790\t    const token = sessionStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n791\t    setIsUpdatingRole(true);\n792\t    setRoleError(\"\"); // Clear any previous errors\n793\t    try {\n794\t      // Check if current user is trying to demote themselves from Dean\n795\t      const currentUser = JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem(\"user\"));\n796\t      if (\n797\t        currentUser.roleID === 4 &&\n798\t        userID === currentUser.userID &&\n799\t        newRoleID !== 4\n800\t      ) {\n801\t        if (otherDeansCount <= 1) {\n802\t          throw new Error(\n803\t            \"Cannot demote yourself. There must be at least one other Dean in the system.\",\n804\t          );\n805\t        }\n806\t      }\n807\t\n808\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/${userID}/role`, {\n809\t        method: \"PATCH\",\n810\t        headers: {\n811\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n812\t          Accept: \"application/json\",\n813\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n814\t        },\n815\t        body: JSON.stringify({ roleID: newRoleID }),\n816\t      });\n817\t\n818\t      if (!response.ok) {\n819\t        const errorData = await response.json();\n820\t        throw new Error(errorData.message || \"Failed to update user role\");\n821\t      }\n822\t\n823\t      const data = await response.json();\n824\t      showToast(data.message || \"User role updated successfully!\", \"success\");\n825\t\n826\t      // Update the user in the local state\n827\t      setUsers((prevUsers) =>\n828\t        prevUsers.map((user) =>\n829\t          user.userID === userID\n830\t            ? { ...user, roleID: newRoleID, role: data.user.role }\n831\t            : user,\n832\t        ),\n833\t      );\n834\t\n835\t      // Update the selected user in the modal\n836\t      setSelectedUser((prev) => ({\n837\t        ...prev,\n838\t        roleID: newRoleID,\n839\t        role: data.user.role,\n840\t      }));\n841\t\n842\t      // Refresh the user list\n843\t      fetchUsers(currentPage);\n844\t\n845\t      // Close the modal after successful update\n846\t      setShowModal(false);\n847\t      setRoleError(\"\");\n848\t    } catch (error) {\n849\t      console.error(\"Error updating user role:\", error);\n850\t      setRoleError(\n851\t        error.message || \"Failed to update user role. Please try again.\",\n852\t      );\n853\t    } finally {\n854\t      setIsUpdatingRole(false);\n855\t    }\n856\t  };\n857\t\n858\t  // Add delete user function\n859\t  const handleDeleteUser = async (userID) => {\n860\t    closeWarning();\n861\t    const token = sessionStorage.getItem(\"token\");\n862\t    setIsDeleting(true);\n863\t    try {\n864\t      const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/users/${userID}`, {\n865\t        method: \"DELETE\",\n866\t        headers: {\n867\t          \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n868\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,\n869\t        },\n870\t      });\n871\t      if (!response.ok) {\n872\t        const errorData = await response.json();\n873\t        throw new Error(errorData.message || \"Failed to delete user\");\n874\t      }\n875\t      showToast(\"User deleted successfully!\", \"success\");\n876\t      fetchUsers(currentPage);\n877\t      setShowModal(false);\n878\t    } catch (error) {\n879\t      showToast(\n880\t        error.message || \"Failed to delete user. {isActive && (\n965\t            <span className=\"absolute -bottom-1 left-1/2 h-1 w-6 -translate-x-1/2 rounded-full bg-orange-500\" />\n966\t          )}\n967\t        </button>,\n968\t      );\n969\t    }\n970\t\n971\t    if (endPage < effectiveTotalPages) {\n972\t      pages.push(\n973\t        <span\n974\t          key=\"ellipsis\"\n975\t          className=\"flex h-8 items-center </button>\n998\t\n999\t          {/* Previous */}\n1000\t          <button\n1001\t            onClick={() => handlePageChange(currentPage - 1)}\n1002\t            disabled={currentPage === 1}\n1003\t )}\n1154\t                    <i className=\"bx bx-chevron-down text-xl\"></i>\n1155\t                  </button>\n1156\t                  {showCampusDropdown && (\n1157\t                    <div                           option.value,\n1178\t                                  ]);\n1179\t                                } else {\n1180\t                                  setCampusFilter(\n1181\t                         </span>\n1192\t                          </label>\n1193\t                        ))}\n1194\t                      </div>\n1195\t                    </div>\n1196\t                  )}\n1197\t                </div>\n1198\t\n1199\t                {/* Position Filter Button */}\n1200\t                <div className=\"relative\" ref={positionDropdownRef}>\n1201\t applyUserActionLocally,\n21\t  canApproveUser,\n22\t  canDisapproveUser,\n23\t  canReapproveUser,\n24\t  getUserCampusLabel,\n25\t  getUserProgramLabel,\n26\t  getUserStatusLabel,\n27\t  getUserStatusFilterKey,\n28\t  getUserYearLevelLabel,\n29\t  getUserYearLevelValue,\n30\t  isActiveUser,\n31\t  isInactiveUser,\n32\t  matchesUserStatusFilter,\n33\t  UserStatusFilter,\n34\t} from '../../../src/utils/userManagement';\n35\t\n36\tconst avatarPalette = ['#FFE17B', '#FFD4EA', '#D9DCFF', '#D6F4D2', '#FFD0B1'];\n37\tconst ADMIN_ROLES = [2, 3, 4, 5];\n38\tconst STUDENT_ROLE = 1;\n39\tconst PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n40\t\n41\tinterface UserItem {\n42\t  userID: number | string;\n43\t  firstName?: string;\n44\t  lastName?: string;\n45\t  email?: string;\n46\t  roleID?: number | string;\n47\t  roleName?: string;\n48\t  [key: string]: any;\n49\t}\n50\t\n51\texport default function AssociateDeanUsersScreen() {\n52\t  const router = useRouter();\n53\t  const { theme } = useTheme();\n54\t  const isDark = theme === 'dark';\n55\t  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();\n56\t\n57\t  // Pagination state\n58\t  const [users, setUsers] = useState<UserItem[]>([]);\n59\t  const [filteredUsers, setFilteredUsers] = useState<UserItem[]>([]);\n60\t  const [stats, setStats] = useState({ admins: 0, students: 0 });\n61\t  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');\n62\t  const [activeRoleFilter, setActiveRoleFilter] = useState('all');\n63\t  const [activeStatusFilter, setActiveStatusFilter] = useState<UserStatusFilter>('all');\n64\t  const [programFilter, setProgramFilter] = useState('all');\n65\t  const [yearFilter, setYearFilter] = useState('all');\n66\t  const [campusFilter, setCampusFilter] = useState('all');\n67\t  const [showAdvancedFilters, setShowAdvancedFilters] = useState(false);\n68\t  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);\n69\t  const [isRefreshing, setIsRefreshing] = useState(false);\n70\t  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n71\t  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true);\n72\t  const [isLoadingMore, setIsLoadingMore] = useState(false);\n73\t  const [selectedUserIDs, setSelectedUserIDs] = useState<Set<number | string>>(new Set());\n74\t  const [selectionMode, setSelectionMode] = useState(false);\n75\t  const [detailUser, setDetailUser] = useState<UserItem | null>(null);\n76\t  const [showDetailModal, setShowDetailModal] = useState(false);\n77\t  const [isBulkActing, setIsBulkActing] = useState(false);\n78\t  const [programOptions, setProgramOptions] = useState<{id: string; label: string}[]>([]);\n79\t  const [campusOptions, setCampusOptions] = useState<{id: string; label: string}[]>([]);\n80\t\n81\t  const fadeAnim = useRef(new Animated.Value(1)).current;\n82\t\n83\t  useEffect(() => {\n84\t    fetchUsers(true);\n85\t  }, []);\n86\t\n87\t  useEffect(() => {\n88\t    applyFilters();\n89\t  }, [searchQuery, programFilter, yearFilter, campusFilter, users, activeStatusFilter]);\n90\t\n91\t  useEffect(() => {\n92\t    fetchUsers(true);\n93\t  }, [activeStatusFilter]);\n94\t\n95\t  useEffect(() => {\n96\t    const loadMeta = async () => {\n97\t      try {\n98\t        const [progRes, campRes] = await Promise.allSettled([\n99\t          apiRequest(\"/api/programs\"),\n100\t          apiRequest(\"/api/campuses\"),\n101\t        ]);\n102\t        if (progRes.status === \"fulfilled\") {\n103\t          const raw = progRes.value;\n104\t          const list = Array.isArray(raw?.programs) ? raw.programs\n105\t            : Array.isArray(raw?.data) ? raw.data\n106\t            : Array.isArray(raw) ? raw : [];\n107\t          setProgramOptions(list.map((p: any) => ({\n108\t            id: String(p.programID ?? p.id),\n109\t            label: p.programName ?? p.name ?? \"\",\n110\t          })).filter((o: any) => o.label));\n111\t        }\n112\t        if (campRes.status === \"fulfilled\") {\n113\t          const raw = campRes.value;\n114\t          const list = Array.isArray(raw?.campuses) ? raw.campuses\n115\t            : Array.isArray(raw?.data) ? raw.data\n116\t            : Array.isArray(raw) ? raw : [];\n117\t          setCampusOptions(list.map((c: any) => ({\n118\t            id: String(c.campusID ?? c.id),\n119\t            label: c.campusName ?? c.name ?? \"\",\n120\t          })).filter((o: any) => o.label));\n121\t        }\n122\t      } catch { /* non-critical */ }\n123\t    };\n124\t    loadMeta();\n125\t  }, []);\n126\t\n127\t  const fetchUsers = async (reset = false) => {\n128\t    const fetchUsers = async (reset = false) => {\n129\t    if (!reset) return; // only initial load / tab switch\n130\t\n131\t    setIsLoading(true);\n132\t    setPage(1);\n133\t    setHasMore(true);\n134\t    try {\n135\t      const data = await apiRequest('/api/users?limit=10000&state=all');\n136\t      const userList: UserItem[] = Array.isArray(data?.users) ? data.users\n137\t        : Array.isArray(data?.data) ? data.data : [];\n138\t      setUsers(userList);\n139\t      setHasMore(false);\n140\t      const adminCount = userList.filter((u: UserItem) => ADMIN_ROLES.includes(Number(u.roleID))).length;\n141\t      const studentCount = userList.filter((u: UserItem) => Number(u.roleID) === STUDENT_ROLE).length;\n142\t      setStats({ admins: adminCount, students: studentCount });\n143\t    } catch (error) {\n144\t      showToast('Unable to load users', 'error');\n145\t    } finally {\n146\t      setIsLoading(false);\n147\t    }\n148\t  };\n149\t\n150\t  const handleLoadMore = () => { /* no-op — all data loaded at once */ };\n151\t\n152\t  const applyFilters = useCallback(() => {\n153\t    let filtered = [...users];\n154\t    if (activeRoleFilter === 'admin') filtered = filtered.filter((u: UserItem) => ADMIN_ROLES.includes(Number(u.roleID)));\n155\t    else if (activeRoleFilter === 'student') filtered = filtered.filter((u: UserItem) => Number(u.roleID) === STUDENT_ROLE);\n156\t    if (activeStatusFilter !== 'all') filtered = filtered.filter((u: UserItem) => matchesUserStatusFilter(u, activeStatusFilter));\n157\t    if (programFilter !== 'all') filtered = filtered.filter((u: UserItem) => String(u.programID) === programFilter);\n158\t    if (yearFilter !== 'all') filtered = filtered.filter((u: UserItem) => String(u.yearLevel) === yearFilter);\n159\t    if (campusFilter !== 'all') filtered = filtered.filter((u: UserItem) => String(u.campusID) === campusFilter);\n160\t    if (searchQuery) {\n161\t      const q = searchQuery.toLowerCase();\n162\t      filtered = filtered.filter((u: UserItem) =>\n163\t        u.firstName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || u.lastName?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||\n164\t        u.email?.toLowerCase().includes(q) || u.userCode?.toLowerCase().includes(q)\n165\t      );\n166\t    }\n167\t    setFilteredUsers(filtered);\n168\t  }, [searchQuery, activeRoleFilter, activeStatusFilter, programFilter, yearFilter, campusFilter, users]);\n169\t\n170\t  const handleAction = async (userID: number, action: string) => {\n171\t    try {\n172\t      await apiRequest(`/api/users/${userID}/${action}`, { method: 'PATCH' });\n173\t      setUsers(prev => prev.map((u: any) => (u.userID === userID ? applyUserActionLocally(u, action as 'approve' | 'activate' | 'deactivate' | 'disapprove' | 'reapprove') : u)));\n174\t      showToast(\n175\t        action === 'approve' ? 'User approved and activated'\n176\t          : action === 'activate' ? 'User activated'\n177\t          : action === 'disapprove' ? 'User disapproved'\n178\t          : action === 'reapprove' ? 'User re-approved and activated'\n179\t          : 'User deactivated',\n180\t        'success'\n181\t      );\n182\t    } catch (error) {\n183\t      showToast(`Failed to ${action} user`, 'error');\n184\t    }\n185\t  };\n186\t\n187\t  const confirmAction = (user: any, action: string) => {\n188\t    const actionLabel = action.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + action.slice(1);\n189\t    const destructiveActions = ['deactivate', 'disapprove'];\n190\t    Alert.alert(`${actionLabel} User`, `${actionLabel} ${user.firstName} ${user.lastName}?`, [\n191\t      { text: 'Cancel', style: 'cancel' },\n192\t      { text: actionLabel, style: destructiveActions.includes(action) ? 'destructive' : 'default', onPress: () => handleAction(user.userID, action) },\n193\t    ]);\n194\t  };\n195\t\n196\t  const handleApproveAll = async () => {\n197\t    const pendingUsers = users.filter((u: any) => canApproveUser(u));\n198\t    if (pendingUsers.length === 0) {\n199\t      showToast('No pending users to approve', 'info');\n200\t      return;\n201\t    }\n202\t    Alert.alert(\n203\t      `Approve ${pendingUsers.length} Users`,\n204\t      `Are you sure you want to approve all ${pendingUsers.length} pending user(s)?`,\n205\t      [\n206\t        { text: 'Cancel', style: 'cancel' },\n207\t        {\n208\t          text: 'Approve All',\n209\t          style: 'default',\n210\t          onPress: async () => {\n211\t            setIsLoading(true);\n212\t            try {\n213\t              const userIDs = pendingUsers.map((u: any) => u.userID);\n214\t              await apiRequest('/api/users/approve-multiple', { method: 'POST', body: { userIDs } });\n215\t              setUsers(prev => prev.map((u: any) =>\n216\t                canApproveUser(u) ? applyUserActionLocally(u, 'approve') : u\n217\t              ));\n218\t              showToast(`${pendingUsers.length} user(s) approved`, 'success');\n219\t            } catch (error: unknown) {\n220\t              const msg = (error as { response?: { data?: { message?: string } }; data?: { message?: string }; message?: string })\n221\t                .response?.data?.message || (error as { data?: { message?: string }; message?: string }).data?.message || 'Failed to approve users';\n222\t              showToast(msg, 'error');\n223\t            } finally {\n224\t              setIsLoading(false);\n225\t            }\n226\t          },\n227\t        },\n228\t      ]\n229\t    );\n230\t  };\n231\t\n232\t  const onRefresh = async () => {\n233\t    setIsRefreshing(true);\n234\t    await fetchUsers(true);\n235\t    setIsRefreshing(false);\n236\t  };\n237\t\n238\t  const toggleSelection = (userID: number) => {\n239\t    const next = new Set(selectedUserIDs);\n240\t    if (next.has(userID)) {\n241\t      next.delete(userID);\n242\t    } else {\n243\t      next.add(userID);\n244\t    }\n245\t    setSelectedUserIDs(next);\n246\t    if (next.size === 0) {\n247\t      setSelectionMode(false);\n248\t    }\n249\t  };\n250\t\n251\t  const selectAllVisible = () => {\n252\t    const ids = filteredUsers.map(u => u.userID);\n253\t    setSelectedUserIDs(new Set(ids));\n254\t  };\n255\t\n256\t  const deselectAll = () => {\n257\t    setSelectedUserIDs(new Set());\n258\t    setSelectionMode(false);\n259\t  };\n260\t\n261\t  const handleBulkAction = async (action: 'approve' | 'activate' | 'deactivate' | 'disapprove' | 'reapprove') => {\n262\t    const ids = Array.from(selectedUserIDs);\n263\t    if (ids.length === 0) return;\n264\t    const actionLabel = action.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + action.slice(1);\n265\t    const destructiveActions = ['deactivate', 'disapprove'];\n266\t    Alert.alert(\n267\t      `${actionLabel} ${ids.length} User(s)`,\n268\t      `Are you sure you want to ${action} ${ids.length} selected user(s)?`,\n269\t      [\n270\t        { text: 'Cancel', style: 'cancel' },\n271\t        {\n272\t          text: actionLabel,\n273\t          style: destructiveActions.includes(action) ? 'destructive' : 'default',\n274\t          onPress: async () => {\n275\t            setIsBulkActing(true);\n276\t            try {\n277\t              await apiRequest(`/api/users/${action}-multiple`, { method: 'POST', body: { userIDs: ids } });\n278\t              setUsers(prev => prev.map((u: any) => {\n279\t                if (!selectedUserIDs.has(u.userID)) return u;\n280\t                return applyUserActionLocally(u, action as 'approve' | 'activate' | 'deactivate' | 'disapprove' | 'reapprove');\n281\t              }));\n282\t              showToast(`${ids.length} user(s) ${action === 'approve' ? 'approved' : action === 'disapprove' ? 'disapproved' : action === 'reapprove' ? 're-approved' : action + 'd'}`, 'success');\n283\t              deselectAll();\n284\t            } catch (error: unknown) {\n285\t              const msg = (error as { data?: { message?: string }; message?: string }).data?.message || `Failed to ${action} users`;\n286\t              showToast(msg, 'error');\n287\t            } finally {\n288\t              setIsBulkActing(false);\n289\t            }\n290\t          },\n291\t        },\n292\t      ]\n293\t    );\n294\t  };\n295\t\n296\t  const openDetail = (user: any) => {\n297\t    setDetailUser(user);\n298\t    setShowDetailModal(true);\n299\t  };\n300\t\n301\t  const getInitials = (user: any) => `${user.firstName?.[0] || ''}${user.lastName?.[0] || ''}`.toUpperCase() || '?';\n302\t  const isAdmin = (user: any) => ADMIN_ROLES.includes(Number(user.roleID));\n303\t\n304\t  const colors = {\n305\t    bg: isDark ? '#000' : '#f3f4f6',\n306\t    card: isDark ? '#1f2937' : '#fff',\n307\t    text: isDark ? '#f9fafb' : '#111827',\n308\t    textSecondary: isDark ? '#9ca3af' : '#6b7280',\n309\t    border: isDark ? '#374151' : '#e5e7eb',\n310\t    inputBg: isDark ? '#111827' : '#fff',\n311\t    orange: '#FE6902',\n312\t    green: '#10B981',\n313\t    red: '#EF4444',\n314\t    blue: '#3B82F6',\n315\t    purple: '#8B5CF6',\n316\t  };\n317\t\n318\t  const years = [...new Set(users.map((u: any) => getUserYearLevelValue(u)).filter(Boolean))].sort((a: any, b: any) => Number(a) - Number(b));\n319\t\n320\t  const renderUser = useCallback(({ item }: { item: any }) => {\n321\t    const isSelected = selectedUserIDs.has(item.userID);\n322\t    const statusLabel = getUserStatusLabel(item);\n323\t    const statusKey = getUserStatusFilterKey(item);\n324\t    const programLabel = getUserProgramLabel(item);\n325\t    const yearLevelLabel = getUserYearLevelLabel(item);\n326\t    return (\n327\t      <TouchableOpacity\n328\t        activeOpacity={0.7}\n329\t        onPress={() => {\n330\t          if (selectionMode) {\n331\t            toggleSelection(item.userID);\n332\t          } else {\n333\t            openDetail(item);\n334\t          }\n335\t        }}\n336\t        onLongPress={() => {\n337\t          if (!selectionMode) setSelectionMode(true);\n338\t          toggleSelection(item.userID);\n339\t        }}\n340\t        className=\"flex-row items-center rounded-2xl p-3 gap-3 mb-2.5\"\n341\t        style={[{ backgroundColor: colors.card, elevation: 2 }, isSelected && { borderWidth: 2, borderColor: colors.orange }]}\n342\t      >\n343\t        {selectionMode ? (\n344\t          <View className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full border-2 justify-center items-center\" style={{ borderColor: colors.orange, backgroundColor: isSelected ? colors.orange : 'transparent' }}>\n345\t            {isSelected && <Ionicons name=\"checkmark\" size={18} color=\"#fff\" />}\n346\t          </View>\n347\t        ) : (\n348\t          <View className=\"w-12 h-12 rounded-full justify-center items-center\" style={{ backgroundColor: avatarPalette[item.userID % avatarPalette.length] }}>\n349\t            <Text className=\"text-base font-extrabold text-slate-900\">{getInitials(item)}</Text>\n350\t          </View>\n351\t        )}\n352\t        <View className=\"flex-1\">\n353\t          <View className=\"flex-row items-center gap-1.5\">\n354\t            <Text className=\"text-[15px] font-bold flex-1\" style={{ color: colors.text }} numberOfLines={1}>{item.firstName} {item.lastName}</Text>\n355\t            <View className=\"px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md\" style={{ backgroundColor: isAdmin(item) ? colors.blue : colors.green }}>\n356\t              <Text className=\"text-white text-[9px] font-bold\">{isAdmin(item) ? (item.roleName || 'Admin') : 'Student'}</Text>\n357\t            </View>\n358\t          </View>\n359\t          <Text className=\"text-xs mt-0.5\" style={{ color: colors.textSecondary }} numberOfLines={1}>{item.email}</Text>\n360\t          <View className=\"flex-row items-center gap-1.5 mt-1\">\n361\t            <View className=\"px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md\" style={{ backgroundColor: statusKey === 'active' ? colors.green : statusKey === 'inactive' ? colors.red : statusKey === 'pending' ? colors.blue : colors.orange }}>\n362\t              <Text className=\"text-white text-[9px] font-semibold\">{statusLabel}</Text>\n363\t            </View>\n364\t            {programLabel && <Text className=\"text-[10px]\" style={{ color: colors.textSecondary }}>{programLabel}</Text>}\n365\t            {yearLevelLabel && <Text className=\"text-[10px]\" style={{ color: colors.textSecondary }}>{yearLevelLabel}</Text>}\n366\t          </View>\n367\t        </View>\n368\t        {!selectionMode && (\n369\t          <View className=\"gap-1\">\n370\t            {canApproveUser(item) && (\n371\t              <TouchableOpacity className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full justify-center items-center\" style={{ backgroundColor: colors.green }} onPress={() => confirmAction(item, 'approve')}><Ionicons name=\"checkmark\" size={18} color=\"#fff\" /></TouchableOpacity>\n372\t            )}\n373\t            {canDisapproveUser(item) && (\n374\t              <TouchableOpacity className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full justify-center items-center\" style={{ backgroundColor: colors.orange }} onPress={() => confirmAction(item, 'disapprove')}><Ionicons name=\"close-circle\" size={18} color=\"#fff\" /></TouchableOpacity>\n375\t            )}\n376\t            {isActiveUser(item) && (\n377\t              <TouchableOpacity className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full justify-center items-center\" style={{ backgroundColor: colors.red }} onPress={() => confirmAction(item, 'deactivate')}><Ionicons name=\"close\" size={18} color=\"#fff\" /></TouchableOpacity>\n378\t            )}\n379\t            {isInactiveUser(item) && (\n380\t              <TouchableOpacity className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full justify-center items-center\" style={{ backgroundColor: colors.blue }} onPress={() => confirmAction(item, 'activate')}><Ionicons name=\"play\" size={18} color=\"#fff\" /></TouchableOpacity>\n381\t            )}\n382\t            {canReapproveUser(item) && (\n383\t              <TouchableOpacity className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full justify-center items-center\" style={{ backgroundColor: colors.purple }} onPress={() => confirmAction(item, 'reapprove')}><Ionicons name=\"refresh\" size={18} color=\"#fff\" /></TouchableOpacity>\n384\t            )}\n385\t          </View>\n386\t        )}\n387\t      </TouchableOpacity>\n388\t    );\n389\t  }, [colors.text, colors.textSecondary, colors.card, colors.blue, colors.green, colors.red, colors.orange, selectedUserIDs, selectionMode]);\n390\t\n391\t  const pendingCount = users.filter((u: any) => canApproveUser(u)).length;\n392\t\n393\t  useScreenFloatingTools(\n394\t    [\n395\t      {\n396\t        key: 'bulk',\n397\t        icon: 'checkbox-outline',\n398\t        label: 'Bulk Actions',\n399\t        onPress: () => setSelectionMode(true),\n400\t      },\n401\t    ],\n402\t    !selectionMode\n403\t  );\n404\t\n405\t  return backgroundColor: colors.card, borderBottomColor: colors.border, paddingTop: insets.top + 8 }}>\n408\t        <TouchableOpacity onPress={() => { if (router.canGoBack()) router.back(); else router.replace('/(auth)/(associate-dean)/dashboard'); }} className=\"p-2 mr-3\"><Ionicons name=\"arrow-back\" size={24} color={colors.text} /></TouchableOpacity>\n409\t        <Text className=\"text-xl font-bold flex-1\" style={{ color: colors.text }}>User Management</Text>\n410\t        {pendingCount > 0 && (\n411\t          <TouchableOpacity className=\"flex-row items-center px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-2xl gap-1\" style={{ backgroundColor: colors.green }} onPress={handleApproveAll} activeOpacity={0.7}>\n412\t            <Ionicons name=\"checkmark-done\" size={18} color=\"#fff\" />\n413\t            <Text className=\"text-white text-xs font-bold\">{pendingCount}</Text>\n414\t          </TouchableOpacity>\n415\t        )}\n416\t      </View>\n417\t\n418\t      {isLoading ? (\n419\t        <View className=\"flex-1 items-center pt-12\">\n420\t          <CapsActivityIndicator size=\"large\" color={colors.orange} />\n421\t          <View className=\"mt-4 px-4 w-full\"><SkeletonList count={5} /></View>\n422\t        </View>\n423\t      ) : (\n424\t        <>\n425\t          <FlatList\n426\t            data={filteredUsers}\n427\t            keyExtractor={(item) => String(item.userID)}\n428\t            renderItem={renderUser}\n429\t            contentContainerStyle={{ padding: 16, paddingBottom: 100 }}\n430\t            refreshControl={<RefreshControl refreshing={isRefreshing} onRefresh={onRefresh} colors={[colors.orange]} tintColor={colors.orange} />}\n431\t            removeClippedSubviews={true}\n432\t            maxToRenderPerBatch={10}\n433\t            windowSize={5}\n434\t            initialNumToRender={15}\n435\t            onEndReached={handleLoadMore}\n436\t            onEndReachedThreshold={0.5}\n437\t            ListFooterComponent={\n438\t              isLoadingMore ? 200);\n134\t    }\n135\t\n136\t    /**\n137\t     * Deactivate user (Only Dean can do this).\n138\t     */\n139\t    public function deactivate($id)\n140\t    {\n141\t        $this->authorizeDeanAccess();\n142\t        $user = User::findOrFail($id);\n143\t        $user->isActive = false;\n144\t        $user->save();\n145\t\n146\t        return response()->json(['message' {\n154\t        $this->authorizeDeanAccess();\n155\t        $user = User::findOrFail($id);\n156\t        $user->isActive = true;\n157\t        $user->save();\n158\t\n159\t        return  */\n181\t    public function deactivateMultipleUsers(Request $request)\n182\t    {\n183\t        $this->authorizeDeanAccess();\n184\t        $validated = $this->validateUserIDs($request);\n185\t hierarchy:\n196\t     * - Dean (4) can approve all roles\n197\t     * - Associate Dean (5) can approve Program Chair (3), Instructor (2), and Student (1) within their campus\n198\t     * - Program Chair (3) can approve Instructor (2) and Student (1) ONLY within their assigned program\n199\t     * - Faculty (2) can approve Student (1) ONLY for their own students\n200\t     */\n201\t    public function approveUser(Request $request, $userID)\n202\t    {\n203\t        try {\n204\t            $authUser = Auth::user();\n205\t            $user = User::findOrFail($userID);\n206\t\n207\t            // Validate if user has permission to approve\n208\t            if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [2, 3, 4, 5])) {\n209\t                return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthorized. You do not have permission to approve users.'], 403);\n210\t            }\n211\t\n212\t            // Check if user is pending\n213\t            if (!$this->isUserPending($user)) {\n214\t                return response()->json(['message' => 'User is already registered.'], 400);\n215\t            }\n216\t\n217\t            // Validate role hierarchy for approval\n218\t            if (!$this->canApproveUser($authUser, $user)) {\n219\t                return response()->json([\n220\t                    'message' => 'You are not authorized to approve users with this role level.'\n221\t                ], 403);\n222\t            }\n223\t\n224\t            // Validate scope-based restrictions\n225\t            if (!$this->canApproveUserInScope($authUser, $user)) {\n226\t                return response()->json([\n227\t                    'message' => 'You cannot approve users outside your assigned scope. ' .\n228\t                                $this->getScopeRestrictionMessage($authUser)\n229\t                ], 403);\n230\t            }\n231\t\n232\t            $this->updateUserStatus($user, 'registered', true);\n233\t\n234\t            $approverInfo = $this->getApproverInfo($authUser);\n235\t            $emailSent = $this->emailService->sendStatusNotification($user, 'approved', $approverInfo['display_name']);\n236\t            if (!$emailSent) {\n237\t                Log::warning('Approval email failed to send', [\n238\t                    'user_id' => $user->userID,\n239\t                    'email' => $user->email,\n240\t                    'approver_id' => $authUser->userID,\n241\t                    'approver_role' => $approverInfo['role'],\n242\t                ]);\n243\t\n244\t                return response()->json([\n245\t                    'message' => 'User approved, but approval email failed to send.',\n246\t                    'user' => $user,\n247\t                    'email' => $user->email,\n248\t                    'approval_info' => $approverInfo,\n249\t                ], 200);\n250\t            }\n251\t\n252\t            Log::info('User
