$approverInfo['role'],\n256\t                'approver_scope' => $approverInfo['scope'],\n257\t            ]);\n258\t\n259\t            return response()->json([\n260\t                'message' => 'User approved successfully.',\n261\t                'user' => $user,\n262\t                'approval_info' => $approverInfo\n263\t            ], 200);\n264\t\n265\t        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n266\t            Log::error('User approval error: ' . $e->getMessage());\n267\t            return response()->json([\n268\t                'message' => 'An error occurred while approving the user.',\n269\t                'error' => $e->getMessage()\n270\t            ], 500);\n271\t        }\n272\t    }\n273\t\n274\t    /**\n275\t     * Check if the authenticated user can approve the target user based on role hierarchy\n276\t     */\n277\t    private function canApproveUser($authUser, $targetUser)\n278\t    {\n279\t        // Dean can approve anyone\n280\t        if ($authUser->roleID === 4) {\n281\t            return true;\n282\t        }\n283\t\n284\t        // Get allowed roles for approval based on auth user's role\n285\t        $allowedRoles = $this->getAllowedApprovalRoles($authUser->roleID);\n286\t\n287\t        // Check if target user's role is in the allowed roles\n288\t        return in_array($targetUser->roleID, $allowedRoles);\n289\t    }\n290\t\n291\t    /**\n292\t     * Get the list of roles that can be approved by a given role\n293\t     */\n294\t    private function getAllowedApprovalRoles($roleID)\n295\t    {\n296\t        return match($roleID) {\n297\t            4 => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], // Dean can approve all\n298\t            5 => [1, 2, 3],      // Associate Dean can approve Program Chair, Instructor, and Student\n299\t            3 => [1, 2],         // Program Chair can approve Instructor and Student\n300\t            2 => [1],            // Faculty can approve Student\n301\t            default => []\n302\t        };\n303\t    }\n304\t\n305\t    /**\n306\t     * Disapprove user (Only Dean and Associate Dean).\n307\t     * Scope restriction: Associate Deans can only disapprove within their campus,\n308\t     * but Program Chairs and Faculty cannot disapprove (only Dean/Associate Dean can).\n309\t     */\n310\t    public function disapproveUser(Request $request, $userID)\n311\t    {\n312\t        $authUser = Auth::user();\n313\t        \n314\t        // Only Dean (4) and Associate Dean (5) can disapprove\n315\t        if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [4, 5])) {\n316\t            return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthorized: Only Dean or Associate Dean can disapprove users.'], 403);\n317\t        }\n318\t\n319\t        $user = User::findOrFail($userID);\n320\t\n321\t        // Associate Dean scope check: can only disapprove users in their campus\n322\t        if ($authUser->roleID === 5 && $user->campusID !== $authUser->campusID) {\n323\t            return response()->json([\n324\t                'message' => 'You can only disapprove users within your assigned campus.'\n325\t            ], 403);\n326\t        }\n327\t\n328\t        $this->updateUserStatus($user, 'disapproved', false);\n329\t\n330\t        $approverInfo = $this->getApproverInfo($authUser);\n331\t        $emailSent = $this->emailService->sendStatusNotification($user, 'disapproved', $approverInfo['display_name']);\n332\t        if (!$emailSent) {\n333\t            Log::warning('Disapproval email failed to send', [\n334\t                'user_id' => $user->userID,\n335\t                'email' => $user->email,\n336\t                'approver_id' => $authUser->userID,\n337\t                'approver_role' => $approverInfo['role'],\n338\t            ]);\n339\t\n340\t            return response()->json([\n341\t                'message' => 'User disapproved, but disapproval email failed to send.',\n342\t                'user' => $user,\n343\t                'email' => $user->email,\n344\t                'approval_info' => $approverInfo,\n345\t            ], 200);\n346\t        }\n347\t\n348\t        Log::info('User disapproved', [\n349\t            'user_id' => $user->userID,\n350\t            'approver_id' => $authUser->userID,\n351\t            'approver_role' => $approverInfo['role'],\n352\t        ]);\n353\t\n354\t        return response()->json([\n355\t            'message' => 'User has been disapproved.',\n356\t            'user' => $user,\n357\t            'approval_info' => $approverInfo\n358\t        ], 200);\n359\t    }\n360\t\n361\t    /**\n362\t     * Approve multiple users at once with role-based scope validation.\n363\t     * Dean can approve all, Associate Dean within their campus,\n364\t     * Program Chair within their program, Faculty for their students.\n365\t     */\n366\t    public function approveMultipleUsers(Request $request)\n367\t    {\n368\t        try {\n369\t            $authUser = Auth::user();\n370\t            \n371\t            // Only Dean, Associate Dean, Program Chair, and Faculty can bulk approve\n372\t            if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [2, 3, 4, 5])) {\n373\t                return response()->json([\n374\t                    'message' => 'Unauthorized: You do not have permission to approve users.'\n375\t                ], 403);\n376\t            }\n377\t\n378\t            $validated = $this->validateUserIDs($request);\n379\t            $statusIds = $this->getStatusIds();\n380\t            $approverInfo = $this->getApproverInfo($authUser);\n381\t            \n382\t            $results = $this->processMultipleApprovalsWithScope(\n383\t                $validated['userIDs'],\n384\t                $statusIds,\n385\t                $authUser,\n386\t                $approverInfo\n387\t            );\n388\t\n389\t            return response()->json([\n390\t                'message' => 'Bulk approval completed.',\n391\t                'approved_users' => $results['approved'],\n392\t                'skipped_users' => $results['skipped'],\n393\t                'scope_restricted_users' => $results['scope_restricted'],\n394\t                'approval_info' => $approverInfo\n395\t            ], 200);\n396\t        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n397\t            Log::error('Bulk approval error: ' . $e->getMessage());\n398\t            return response()->json([\n399\t                'message' => 'An error occurred during bulk approval.',\n400\t                'error' => $e->getMessage()\n401\t            ], 500);\n402\t        }\n403\t    }\n404\t\n405\t    /**\n406\t     * Update the authenticated user's profile.\n407\t     */\n408\t    public function updateProfile(Request $request)\n409\t    {\n410\t        try {\n411\t            $user = Auth::user();\n412\t            if (!$user) {\n413\t                return response()->json(['message' => 'User not authenticated.'], 401);\n414\t            }\n415\t\n416\t            $validated = $this->validateProfileUpdate($request, $user);\n417\t            $this->updateUserProfile($user, $validated);\n418\t\n419\t            return response()->json([\n420\t                'message' => 'Profile updated successfully.',\n421\t                'user' => $user\n422\t            ]);\n423\t        } catch (\\Illuminate\\Validation\\ValidationException $e) {\n424\t            return $this->handleValidationError($e);\n425\t        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n426\t            Log::error('Profile update error: ' . $e->getMessage());\n427\t            return response()->json([\n428\t                'message' => 'An unexpected error occurred while updating your profile.',\n429\t                'error' => $e->getMessage()\n430\t            ], 500);\n431\t        }\n432\t    }\n433\t\n434\t    /**\n435\t     * Change user role with specific permissions.\n436\t     */\n437\t    public function changeUserRole(Request $request, $userID)\n438\t    {\n439\t        try {\n440\t            $authUser = Auth::user();\n441\t            if (!$authUser) {\n442\t                return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthenticated'], 401);\n443\t            }\n444\t\n445\t            // Validate role change permission\n446\t            if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [3, 4, 5])) {\n447\t                return response()->json([\n448\t                    'message' => 'Unauthorized: Only Dean, Associate Dean, or Program Chair can change user roles'\n449\t                ], 403);\n450\t            }\n451\t\n452\t            // Validate request data\n453\t            $validated = $request->validate([\n454\t                'roleID' => 'required|integer|exists:roles,roleID'\n455\t            ]);\n456\t\n457\t            // Get target user\n458\t            $user = User::findOrFail($userID);\n459\t\n460\t            // Role hierarchy restrictions\n461\t            if ($authUser->roleID === 3) { // Program Chair\n462\t                // Program Chair cannot edit Associate Dean (5) or Dean (4)\n463\t                if ($user->roleID >= 4) {\n464\t                    return response()->json([\n465\t                        'message' => 'Program Chair cannot modify roles of Associate Dean or Dean'\n466\t                    ], 403);\n467\t                }\n468\t                // Can only edit users in their program\n469\t                if ($user->programID !== $authUser->programID) {\n470\t                    return response()->json([\n471\t                        'message' => 'You can only change roles of users within your program'\n472\t                    ], 403);\n473\t                }\n474\t            } elseif ($authUser->roleID === 5) { // Associate Dean\n475\t                // Associate Dean cannot edit Dean (4)\n476\t                if ($user->roleID === 4) {\n477\t                    return response()->json([\n478\t                        'message' => 'Associate Dean cannot modify Dean\\'s role'\n479\t                    ], 403);\n480\t                }\n481\t                // Can only edit users in their campus\n482\t                if ($user->campusID !== $authUser->campusID) {\n483\t                    return response()->json([\n484\t                        'message' => 'You can only change roles of users within your campus'\n485\t                    ], 403);\n486\t                }\n487\t            }\n488\t            // Dean (roleID 4) can edit everyone, no restrictions needed\n489\t\n490\t            // Validate role change scope\n491\t            $allowedRoleChanges = $this->getAllowedRoleChanges($authUser->roleID);\n492\t            if (!in_array($validated['roleID'], $allowedRoleChanges)) {\n493\t                return response()->json([\n494\t                    'message' => 'You are not authorized to assign this role'\n495\t                ], 403);\n496\t            }\n497\t\n498\t            // Update the role\n499\t            $user->roleID = $validated['roleID'];\n500\t            $user->save();\n501\t\n502\t            return response()->json([\n503\t                'message' => 'User role updated successfully',\n504\t                'user' => $user\n505\t            ], 200);\n506\t\n507\t        } catch (\\Illuminate\\Validation\\ValidationException $e) {\n508\t            return response()->json([\n509\t                'message' => 'Validation failed',\n510\t                'errors' => $e->errors()\n511\t            ], 422);\n512\t        } catch (\\Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\ModelNotFoundException $e) {\n513\t            return response()->json([\n514\t                'message' => 'User not found'\n515\t            ], 404);\n516\t        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n517\t            Log::error('Role change error: ' . $e->getMessage());\n518\t            return response()->json([\n519\t                'message' => 'An unexpected error occurred while changing the user role',\n520\t                'error' => $e->getMessage()\n521\t            ], 500);\n522\t        }\n523\t    }\n524\t\n525\t    /**\n526\t     * Delete a specific user (Only Dean and Associate Dean).\n527\t     */\n528\t    public function deleteUser($id)\n529\t    {\n530\t        $authUser = Auth::user();\n531\t        if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [4, 5])) {\n532\t            return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthorized: Only the Dean or Associate Dean can delete users'], 403);\n533\t        }\n534\t        $user = User::find($id);\n535\t        if (!$user) {\n536\t            return response()->json(['message' => 'User not found'], 404);\n537\t        }\n538\t        $user->delete();\n539\t        return response()->json(['message' => 'User deleted successfully'], 200);\n540\t    }\n541\t\n542\t    /**\n543\t     * Delete multiple users (Only Dean and Associate Dean).\n544\t     */\n545\t    public function deleteMultipleUsers(Request $request)\n546\t    {\n547\t        $authUser = Auth::user();\n548\t        if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [4, 5])) {\n549\t            return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthorized: Only the Dean or Associate Dean can delete users'], 403);\n550\t        }\n551\t        $validated = $request->validate([\n552\t            'userIDs' => 'required|array',\n553\t            'userIDs.*' => 'integer|exists:users,userID'\n554\t        ]);\n555\t        $deleted = [];\n556\t        foreach ($validated['userIDs'] as $userID) {\n557\t            $user = User::find($userID);\n558\t            if ($user) {\n559\t                $user->delete();\n560\t                $deleted[] = $userID;\n561\t            }\n562\t        }\n563\t        return response()->json([\n564\t            'message' => 'Selected users deleted successfully.',\n565\t            'deleted_users' => $deleted\n566\t        ], 200);\n567\t    }\n568\t\n569\t    // Private helper methods\n570\t\n571\t    private function authorizeDeanAccess()\n572\t    {\n573\t        $authUser = Auth::user();\n574\t        abort_unless($authUser && in_array($authUser->roleID, [4, 5]), 403, 'Unauthorized: Only the Dean or Associate Dean can perform this action');\n575\t    }\n576\t\n577\t    private function buildUserQuery(Request $request)\n578\t    {\n579\t        $query = User::with(['role', 'campus', 'program', 'status', 'student']);\n580\t        $user = Auth::user();\n581\t\n582\t        // Apply role-based filters\n583\t        if ($user->roleID === 5) {\n584\t            // Associate Dean can only view users from their campus\n585\t            if ($user->campusID) {\n586\t                $query->where('campusID', $user->campusID);\n587\t            } else {\n588\t                Log::warning(\"Associate Dean {$user->userID} has no campus assigned\");\n589\t                $query->where('campusID', 0); // This will return no results\n590\t            }\n591\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 3) {\n592\t            // Program Chair can only view users from their campus and program\n593\t            if ($user->campusID && $user->programID) {\n594\t                $query->where('campusID', $user->campusID)\n595\t                      ->where('programID', $user->programID);\n596\t            } else {\n597\t                Log::warning(\"Program Chair {$user->userID} has missing campus or program assignment\");\n598\t                $query->where('campusID', 0); // This will return no results\n599\t            }\n600\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 2) {\n601\t            // Faculty can only view students from their campus and program\n602\t            if ($user->campusID && $user->programID) {\n603\t                $query->where('campusID', $user->campusID)\n604\t                      ->where('programID', $user->programID)\n605\t                      ->where('roleID', 1); // Only show students (roleID 1)\n606\t            } else {\n607\t                Log::warning(\"Faculty {$user->userID} has missing campus or program assignment\");\n608\t                $query->where('campusID', 0); // This will return no results\n609\t            }\n610\t        }\n611\t        // Dean (roleID 4) can view all users, so no additional filters needed\n612\t\n613\t        $this->applyDefaultStateVisibility($query, $request);\n614\t        $this->applySearchFilters($query, $request);\n615\t        return $query;\n616\t    }\n617\t\n618\t    private function applyDefaultStateVisibility($query, Request $request)\n619\t    {\n620\t        $state = strtolower(trim((string) $request->input('state', '')));\n621\t        $status = strtolower(trim((string) $request->input('status', '')));\n622\t\n623\t        // If state or status is explicitly provided, use that filter\n624\t        // Also return early for non-default statuses so they bypass the default registered-only filter\n625\t        if (in_array($state, ['active', 'inactive', 'all'], true)\n626\t            || in_array($status, ['pending', 'registered', 'disapproved'], true)) {\n627\t            return;\n628\t        }\n629\t\n630\t        // Default: show only active registered users\n631\t        $query->where(function ($q) {\n632\t            $q->where('isActive', true)\n633\t              ->whereHas('status', function ($statusQuery) {\n634\t                  $statusQuery->where('name', 'registered');\n635\t              });\n636\t        });\n637\t    }\n638\t\n639\t    private function applySearchFilters($query, Request $request)\n640\t    {\n641\t        $filters = [\n642\t            'search' => function($q, $value) {\n643\t                $q->where(function($q) use ($value) {\n644\t                    $q->where('firstName', 'like', \"%{$value}%\")\n645\t                      ->orWhere('lastName', 'like', \"%{$value}%\")\n646\t                      ->orWhere('email', 'like', \"%{$value}%\")\n647\t                      ->orWhere('userCode', 'like', \"%{$value}%\");\n648\t                });\n649\t            },\n650\t            'status' => function($q, $value) {\n651\t                if ($value && $value !== 'all') {\n652\t                    $q->whereHas('status', function($q) use ($value) {\n653\t                        $q->where('name', $value);\n654\t                    });\n655\t                }\n656\t            },\n657\t            'campus' => function($q, $value) {\n658\t                $q->whereHas('campus', function($q) use ($value) {\n659\t                    $q->where('campusName', $value);\n660\t                });\n661\t            },\n662\t            'role' => function($q, $value) {\n663\t                $q->whereHas('role', function($q) use ($value) {\n664\t                    $q->where('roleName', $value);\n665\t                });\n666\t            },\n667\t            'position' => function($q, $value) {\n668\t                $q->whereHas('role', function($q) use ($value) {\n669\t                    $q->where('roleName', $value);\n670\t                });\n671\t            },\n672\t            'program' => function($q, $value) {\n673\t                $q->whereHas('program', function($q) use ($value) {\n674\t                    $q->where('programName', $value);\n675\t                });\n676\t            },\n677\t            'state' => function($q, $value) {\n678\t                $normalizedValue = strtolower(trim((string) $value));\n679\t\n680\t                if ($normalizedValue === 'all' || $normalizedValue === '') {\n681\t                    return;\n682\t                }\n683\t\n684\t                if ($normalizedValue === 'active') 'registered');\n688\t                      });\n689\t                    return;\n690\t                }\n691\t\n692\t                if ($normalizedValue === 'inactive') {\n693\t                    $q->where('isActive', false)\n694\t                      ->whereHas('status', function ($statusQuery) {\n695\t                          $statusQuery->where('name', 'registered');\n696\t                      });\n697\t                }\n698\t            }\n699\t        ];\n700\t\n701\t        foreach ($filters as $key => $callback) {\n702\t            if ($value = $request->input($key)) {\n703\t                $callback($query, $value);\n704\t            }\n705\t        }\n706\t    }\n707\t\n708\t    private function paginateResults($query, Request $request)\n709\t    {\n710\t        $perPage = min((int)$request->input('limit', 20), 100); // Default 20, max 100\n711\t        $page = max((int)$request->input('page', 1), 1);\n712\t        $total = $query->count();\n713\t\n714\t        $users = ->first();\n734\t                              $curriculum = $curriculumRow ? $curriculumRow->curriculumType : null;\n735\t                          }\n736\t                          return [\n737\t                              'userID' => $user->userID,\n738\t                              'userCode' => $user->userCode,\n739\t                              'firstName' => $user->firstName,\n740\t                              'lastName' => $user->lastName,\n741\t                              'email' => $user->email,\n742\t                              'roleID' => $user->roleID,\n743\t                              'campusID' => $user->campusID,\n744\t                              'programID' => $user->programID,\n745\t                              'role' => $user->role ? $user->role->roleName :                  'status' => $user->status ? $user->status->name : 'Unknown',\n751\t                              'remarks' => $remarks,\n752\t                              'curriculum' =>   'users' => $users,\n764\t            'total' => $total,\n765\t            'page' => (int)$page,\n766\t            'totalPages' => ceil($total / $perPage)\n767\t        ];\n768\t    }\n769\t\n770\t }\n802\t\n803\t    private function updateUserStatus($user, $status, $isActive)\n804\t    {\n805\t        $statusId = DB::table('statuses')->where('name', $status)->first()->id;\n806\t processMultipleApprovals($userIDs, $statusIds, $approverName = 'The Dean')\n822\t    {\n823\t        $approved = [];\n824\t        $skipped = [];\n825\t\n826\t        foreach ($userIDs as $userID) * Process multiple user approvals with scope validation\n849\t     * Filters users based on approver's authority and scope\n850\t     */\n851\t    private function processMultipleApprovalsWithScope($userIDs, $statusIds, $authUser, $approverInfo)\n852\t    {\n853\t        $approved = [];\n854\t        $skipped = [];\n855\t        $scopeRestricted = [];\n856\t\n857\t        foreach ($userIDs as $userID) {\n858\t            $user = User::find($userID);\n859\t            \n860\t            // Check if user exists and is pending\n861\t            if         continue;\n876\t            }\n877\t\n878\t            // Check scope restrictions\n879\t            if (!$this->canApproveUserInScope($authUser, $user)) {\n880\t                $scopeRestricted[] = [\n881\t                    'userID' => $userID,\n882\t                    'reason' => $this->getScopeRestrictionMessage($authUser)\n883\t                ];\n884\t                continue;\n885\t            }\n886\t\n887\t            // Approve the user\n888\t            $user->update([\n889\t                'status_id' => $statusIds['registered'],\n890\t                'isActive' => true\n891\t            ]);\n892\t\n893\t            // Send email notification with approver info\n894\t            $this->emailService->sendStatusNotification(\n895\t                $user,\n896\t                'approved',\n897\t                $approverInfo['display_name']\n898\t            );\n899\t\n900\t            $approved[] = $user;\n901\t\n902\t            Log::info('User           ]);\n907\t        }\n908\t\n909\t        return [\n910\t            'approved' => $approved,\n911\t            'skipped' => $skipped,\n912\t            'scope_restricted' => (!$user instanceof User) {\n940\t            $eloquentUser = User::find($user->userID);\n941\t            if (!$eloquentUser) {\n942\t                throw new \\Exception('User record not $user->save();\n953\t        }\n954\t    }\n955\t\n956\t    private function handleValidationError($e)\n957\t    {\n958\t        $customErrors = [];\n959\t        if (isset($e->errors()['email'])) {\n960\t            $customErrors['email'] = ['The email is already in use by another account.'];\n961\t        }\n962\t        if (isset($e->errors()['userCode'])) {\n963\t           3 => [1, 2],         // Program Chair can change Instructor and Student\n977\t            default => []\n978\t        };\n979\t    }\n980\t\n981\t    private function getApproverDisplayName($user)\n982\t    {\n983\t        $approverName = $user->firstName . ' ' . $user->lastName;\n984\t        \n985\t        // Add role and program information\n986\t        $roleNames = [\n987\t            1 => 'Student',\n988\t            2 => 'Instructor',\n989\t            3 => 'Program Chair',\n990\t            4 => 'Dean',\n991\t            5 => 'Associate Dean'\n992\t        ];\n993\t        \n994\t        $roleName = $roleNames[$user->roleID] ?? '';\n999\t            return \"{$approverName} - {$programName} {$roleName}\";\n1000\t        }\n1001\t        \n1002\t        // For Dean and Associate Dean, just show role\n1003\t        if (in_array($user->roleID, [4, 5])) {\n1004\t            return $roleName;\n1005\t        }\n1006\t        \n1007\t        return $approverName;\n1008\t    }\n1009\t\n1010\t    /**\n1011\t     * Get comprehensive approver information including role, scope, and display name\n1012\t     * Provides transparency about who approved and their authority level\n1013\t     */\n1014\t    private function getApproverInfo($user)\n1015\t    {\n1016\t        $roleNames = [\n1017\t            1 => 'Student',\n1018\t            2 => 'Faculty/Instructor',\n1019\t            3 => 'Program Chair',\n1020\t            4 => 'Dean',\n1021\t            5 => 'Associate Dean'\n1022\t        ];\n1023\t        \n1024\t        $roleName = $roleNames[$user->roleID] ?? 'Administrator';\n1025\t        \n1026\t        $displayName = $user->firstName . ' ' . $user->lastName;\n1027\t        $campusName = $user->campus ? $user->campus->campusName : 'N/A';\n1028\t        $programName = $user->program ? $user->program->programName : 'N/A';\n1029\t        \n1030\t        $info = [\n1031\t            'approver_id' => $user->userID,\n1032\t            'approver_name' => $displayName,\n1033\t            'role' => $roleName,\n1034\t            'campus' => $campusName,\n1035\t            'program' => $programName,\n1036\t            'display_name' => $displayName . ' (' . $roleName . ')',\n1037\t            'scope' => $this->getApproverScope($user)\n1038\t        ];\n1039\t        \n1040\t        // Build detailed display name with scope information\n1041\t        if ($user->roleID === 4) {\n1042\t            $info['display_name'] = $displayName . ' - Dean (Full Authority)';\n1043\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 5) {\n1044\t            $info['display_name'] = $displayName . ' - Associate Dean (' . $campusName . ' Campus)';\n1045\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 3) {\n1046\t            $info['display_name'] = $displayName . ' - Program Chair (' . $programName . ')';\n1047\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 2) {\n1048\t            $info['display_name'] = $displayName . ' - Faculty (' . $programName . ')';\n1049\t        }\n1050\t        \n1051\t        return $info;\n1052\t    }\n1053\t\n1054\t    /**\n1055\t     * Get the scope of authority for an approver\n1056\t     */\n1057\t    private function getApproverScope($user)\n1058\t    {\n1059\t        switch ($user->roleID) {\n1060\t            case 4:\n1061\t                return 'Institution-wide Authority';\n1062\t            case 5:\n1063\t                return 'Campus: ' . ($user->campus ? $user->campus->campusName : 'Unassigned');\n1064\t            case 3:\n1065\t                return 'Program: ' . ($user->program ? $user->program->programName : 'Unassigned');\n1066\t            case 2:\n1067\t                return 'Students in: ' . ($user->program ? $user->program->programName : 'Unassigned');\n1068\t            default:\n1069\t                return 'Limited Authority';\n1070\t        }\n1071\t    }\n1072\t\n1073\t    /**\n1074\t     * Check if approver can approve user within their assigned scope\n1075\t     * - Program Chairs can ONLY approve within their assigned program\n1076\t     * - Faculty can ONLY approve their own students\n1077\t     * - Deans have no scope restrictions\n1078\t     */\n1079\t    private function canApproveUserInScope($authUser, $targetUser)\n1080\t    {\n1081\t        // Dean has full authority, no scope restrictions\n1082\t        if ($authUser->roleID === 4) {\n1083\t            return true;\n1084\t        }\n1085\t\n1086\t        // Associate Dean can approve users in their campus\n1087\t        if ($authUser->roleID === 5) {\n1088\t            return $targetUser->campusID === $authUser->campusID;\n1089\t        }\n1090\t\n1091\t        // Program Chair can ONLY approve users within their assigned program\n1092\t        if ($authUser->roleID === 3) {\n1093\t            return $targetUser->programID === $authUser->programID &&\n1094\t                   $targetUser->campusID === $authUser->campusID;\n1095\t        }\n1096\t\n1097\t        // Faculty can ONLY approve students (roleID 1) in their program\n1098\t        if ($authUser->roleID === 2) {\n1099\t            return $targetUser->roleID === 1 && // Only students\n1100\t                   $targetUser->programID === $authUser->programID &&\n1101\t                   $targetUser->campusID === $authUser->campusID;\n1102\t        }\n1103\t\n1104\t        return false;\n1105\t    }\n1106\t\n1107\t    /**\n1108\t     * Get user-friendly scope restriction message for error responses\n1109\t     */\n1110\t    private function getScopeRestrictionMessage($authUser)\n1111\t    {\n1112\t        switch ($authUser->roleID) {\n1113\t            case 3: // Program Chair\n1114\t                $programName = $authUser->program ? $authUser->program->programName : 'your assigned program';\n1115\t                return \"As a Program Chair, you can only approve users within {$programName}.\";\n1116\t            case 2: // Faculty\n1117\t                $programName = $authUser->program ? $authUser->program->programName : 'your assigned program';\n1118\t                return \"As Faculty, you can only approve students within {$programName}.\";\n1119\t            case 5: // Associate Dean\n1120\t                $campusName = $authUser->campus ? $authUser->campus->campusName : 'your assigned campus';\n1121\t                return \"As an Associate Dean, you can only approve users within {$campusName}.\";\n1122\t            default:\n1123\t                return \"You do not have authority to approve this user.\";\n1124\t        }\n1125\t    }\n1126\t}\n1127\t\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it Automated behaviors (\"from now on when X\", \"each time X\", \"whenever X\", \"before/after X\") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions (\"allow X\", \"add permission\", \"move permission to\"), env vars (\"set X=Y\"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. (\\Illuminate\\Validation\\ValidationException $e) {\n508\t            return response()->json([\n509\t                'message' => 'Validation failed',\n510\t                'errors' => $e->errors()\n511\t            ], 422);\n512\t        } catch (\\Illuminate\\Database\\Eloquent\\ModelNotFoundException $e) {\n513\t            return response()->json([\n514\t                'message' => 'User not found'\n515\t            ], 404);\n516\t        } catch (\\Exception $e) {\n517\t            Log::error('Role change error: ' . $e->getMessage());\n518\t            return response()->json([\n519\t                'message' => 'An unexpected error occurred while changing the user role',\n520\t                'error' => $e->getMessage()\n521\t            ], 500);\n522\t        }\n523\t    }\n524\t\n525\t    /**\n526\t     * Delete a specific user (Only Dean and Associate Dean).\n527\t     */\n528\t    public function deleteUser($id)\n529\t    {\n530\t        $authUser = Auth::user();\n531\t        if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [4, 5])) {\n532\t            return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthorized: Only the Dean or Associate Dean can delete users'], 403);\n533\t        }\n534\t        $user = User::find($id);\n535\t        if (!$user) {\n536\t            return response()->json(['message' => 'User not found'], 404);\n537\t        }\n538\t        $user->delete();\n539\t        return response()->json(['message' => 'User deleted successfully'], 200);\n540\t    }\n541\t\n542\t    /**\n543\t     * Delete multiple users (Only Dean and Associate Dean).\n544\t     */\n545\t    public function deleteMultipleUsers(Request $request)\n546\t    {\n547\t        $authUser = Auth::user();\n548\t        if (!in_array($authUser->roleID, [4, 5])) {\n549\t            return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthorized: Only the Dean or Associate Dean can delete users'], 403);\n550\t        }\n551\t        $validated = $request->validate([\n552\t            'userIDs' => 'required|array',\n553\t            'userIDs.*' => 'integer|exists:users,userID'\n554\t        ]);\n555\t        $deleted = [];\n556\t $userID;\n561\t            }\n562\t        }\n563\t        return response()->json([\n564\t            'message' => 'Selected users deleted successfully.',\n565\t            'deleted_users' => $deleted\n566\t        ], 200);\n567\t    }\n568\t\n569\t    // Private helper methods\n570\t\n571\t    private function authorizeDeanAccess()\n572\t    {\n573\t        $authUser = Auth::user();\n574\t        abort_unless($authUser && in_array($authUser->roleID, [4, 5]), 403, 'Unauthorized: Only the Dean or Associate Dean can perform this action');\n575\t    }\n576\t\n577\t    private function buildUserQuery(Request $request)\n578\t    {\n579\t        $query = User::with(['role', 'campus', 'program', 'status', 'student']);\n580\t        $user = Auth::user();\n581\t\n582\t        // Apply role-based filters\n583\t        if ($user->roleID === 5) {\n584\t            // Associate Dean can only view users from their campus\n585\t            if ($user->campusID) {\n586\t                $query->where('campusID', $user->campusID);\n587\t            } else {\n588\t                Log::warning(\"Associate Dean {$user->userID} has no campus assigned\");\n589\t                $query->where('campusID', 0); // This will return no results\n590\t            }\n591\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 3) {\n592\t            // Program Chair can only view users from their campus and program\n593\t            if ($user->campusID && $user->programID) {\n594\t                $query->where('campusID', $user->campusID)\n595\t                      ->where('programID', $user->programID);\n596\t            } else {\n597\t                Log::warning(\"Program Chair {$user->userID} has missing campus or program assignment\");\n598\t                $query->where('campusID', 0); // This will return no results\n599\t            }\n600\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 2) {\n601\t            // Faculty can only view students from their campus and program\n602\t            if ($user->campusID && $user->programID) {\n603\t                $query->where('campusID', $user->campusID)\n604\t                      ->where('programID', $user->programID)\n605\t                      ->where('roleID', 1); // Only show students (roleID 1)\n606\t            } else {\n607\t                Log::warning(\"Faculty {$user->userID} has missing campus or program assignment\");\n608\t                $query->where('campusID', 0); // This will return no results\n609\t            }\n610\t        }\n611\t        // Dean (roleID 4) can view all users, so no additional filters needed\n612\t\n613\t        $this->applyDefaultStateVisibility($query, $request);\n614\t        $this->applySearchFilters($query, $request);\n615\t        return $query;\n616\t    }\n617\t\n618\t    private function applyDefaultStateVisibility($query, Request $request)\n619\t    {\n620\t        $state = strtolower(trim((string) $request->input('state', '')));\n621\t        $status = strtolower(trim((string) $request->input('status', '')));\n622\t\n623\t        // If state or status is explicitly provided, use that filter\n624\t        // Also return early for non-default statuses so they bypass the default registered-only filter\n625\t        if (in_array($state, ['active', 'inactive', 'all'], true)\n626\t            || in_array($status, ['pending', 'registered', 'disapproved'], true)) {\n627\t            return;\n628\t        }\n629\t\n630\t        // Default: show only active registered users\n631\t        $query->where(function ($q) {\n632\t            $q->where('isActive', true)\n633\t              ->whereHas('status', function ($statusQuery) {\n634\t                  $statusQuery->where('name', 'registered');\n635\t              });\n636\t        });\n637\t    }\n638\t\n639\t    private function applySearchFilters($query, Request $request)\n640\t    {\n641\t        $filters = [\n642\t            'search' => function($q, $value) {\n643\t                $q->where(function($q) use ($value) {\n644\t                    $q->where('firstName', 'like', \"%{$value}%\")\n645\t                      ->orWhere('lastName', 'like', \"%{$value}%\")\n646\t                      ->orWhere('email', 'like', \"%{$value}%\")\n647\t                      ->orWhere('userCode', 'like', \"%{$value}%\");\n648\t                });\n649\t            },\n650\t            'status' => function($q, $value) {\n651\t                if ($value && $value !== 'all') {\n652\t                    $q->whereHas('status', function($q) use ($value) {\n653\t                        $q->where('name', $value);\n654\t                    });\n655\t                }\n656\t            },\n657\t            'campus' => function($q, $value) {\n658\t                $q->whereHas('campus', function($q) use ($value) {\n659\t                    $q->where('campusName', $value);\n660\t                });\n661\t            },\n662\t            'role' => function($q, $value) {\n663\t                $q->whereHas('role', function($q) use ($value) {\n664\t                    $q->where('roleName', $value);\n665\t                });\n666\t            },\n667\t            'position' => function($q, $value) {\n668\t                $q->whereHas('role', function($q) use ($value) {\n669\t                    $q->where('roleName', $value);\n670\t                });\n671\t            },\n672\t            'program' => function($q, $value) {\n673\t                $q->whereHas('program', function($q) use ($value) {\n674\t                    $q->where('programName', $value);\n675\t                });\n676\t            },\n677\t            'state' => function($q, $value) {\n678\t                $normalizedValue = strtolower(trim((string) $value));\n679\t\n680\t                if ($normalizedValue === 'all' || $normalizedValue === '') {\n681\t                    return;\n682\t                }\n683\t\n684\t                if ($normalizedValue === 'active') {\n685\t                    $q->where('isActive', true)\n686\t                      ->whereHas('status', function ($statusQuery) {\n687\t                          $statusQuery->where('name', 'registered');\n688\t                      });\n689\t                    return;\n690\t                }\n691\t\n692\t                if ($normalizedValue === 'inactive') {\n693\t                    $q->where('isActive', false)\n694\t                      ->whereHas('status', function ($statusQuery) {\n695\t                          $statusQuery->where('name', 'registered');\n696\t                      });\n697\t                }\n698\t            }\n699\t        ];\n700\t\n701\t        foreach ($filters as $key => $callback) {\n702\t            if ($value = $request->input($key)) {\n703\t                $callback($query, $value);\n704\t            }\n705\t        }\n706\t    }\n707\t\n708\t    private function paginateResults($query, Request $request)\n709\t    {\n710\t        $perPage = min((int)$request->input('limit', 20), 100); // Default 20, max 100\n711\t        $page = max((int)$request->input('page', 1), 1);\n712\t        $total = $query->count();\n713\t\n714\t        $users = $query->orderBy('userID', 'desc')\n715\t                      ->skip(($page - 1) * $perPage)\n716\t                      ->take($perPage)\n717\t                      ->get()\n718\t                      ->map(function ($user) {\n719\t                          // Fetch remarks and curriculum for students\n720\t                          $remarks = null;\n721\t                          $curriculum = null;\n722\t                          if ($user->roleID == 1) {\n723\t                              $remarksRow = \\DB::table('student_remarks')\n724\t                                  ->join('remarks', 'student_remarks.remarksID', '=', 'remarks.id')\n725\t                                  ->where('student_remarks.userID', $user->userID)\n726\t                                  ->select('remarks.remarksType')\n727\t                                  ->first();\n728\t                              $remarks = $remarksRow ? $remarksRow->remarksType : null;\n729\t                              $curriculumRow = \\DB::table('student_curricula')\n730\t                                  ->join('curriculum', 'student_curricula.curriculumID', '=', 'curriculum.id')\n731\t                                  ->where('student_curricula.userID', $user->userID)\n732\t                                  ->select('curriculum.curriculumType')\n733\t                                  ->first();\n734\t                              $curriculum = $curriculumRow ? $curriculumRow->curriculumType : null;\n735\t                          }\n736\t                          return [\n737\t                              'userID' => $user->userID,\n738\t                              'userCode' => $user->userCode,\n739\t                              'firstName' => $user->firstName,\n740\t                              'lastName' => $user->lastName,\n741\t                              'email' => $user->email,\n742\t                              'roleID' => $user->roleID,\n743\t                              'campusID' => $user->campusID,\n744\t                              'programID' => $user->programID,\n745\t                              'role' => $user->role ? $user->role->roleName : 'Unknown',\n746\t                              'campus' => $user->campus ? $user->campus->campusName : 'Unknown',\n747\t                              'program' => $user->program ? $user->program->programName : 'Not Assigned',\n748\t                              'isActive' => $user->isActive,\n749\t                              'status_id' => $user->status_id,\n750\t                              'status' => $user->status ? $user->status->name : 'Unknown',\n751\t                              'remarks' => $remarks,\n752\t                              'curriculum' => $curriculum,\n753\t                              'yearLevel' => $user->student ? $user->student->yearLevel : null,\n754\t                              'student_profile' => $user->student ? [\n755\t                                  'year_level' => $user->student->yearLevel,\n756\t                                  'block' => $user->student->block,\n757\t                                  'programID' => $user->student->programID,\n758\t                              ] : null,\n759\t                          ];\n760\t                      });\n761\t\n762\t        return [\n763\t            'users' => $users,\n764\t            'total' => $total,\n765\t            'page' => (int)$page,\n766\t            'totalPages' => ceil($total / $perPage)\n767\t        ];\n768\t    }\n769\t\n770\t    private function canUpdateUser($authUser, $userId)\n771\t    {\n772\t        return $authUser->roleID < 3 || $authUser->userID == $userId;\n773\t    }\n774\t\n775\t    private function validateUserIDs(Request $request)\n776\t    {\n777\t        return $request->validate([\n778\t            'userIDs' => 'required|array',\n779\t            'userIDs.*' => 'integer|exists:users,userID'\n780\t        ]);\n781\t    }\n782\t\n783\t    private function processMultipleUsers($userIDs, $activate)\n784\t    {\n785\t        $processedUsers = [];\n786\t                $user->save();\n791\t                $processedUsers[] = $userID;\n792\t            }\n793\t        }\n794\t        return $processedUsers;\n795\t    }\n796\t\n797\t    private function isUserPending($user)\n798\t    {\n799\t        $pendingStatusId = DB::table('statuses')->where('name', 'pending')->first()->id;\n800\t        return $user->status_id === $pendingStatusId;\n801\t    }\n802\t\n803\t    private function updateUserStatus($user, $status, $isActive)\n804\t    {\n805\t        $statusId = DB::table('statuses')->where('name', $status)->first()->id;\n806\t        $user->update([\n807\t            'status_id' => $statusId,\n808\t            'isActive' => $isActive\n809\t        ]);\n810\t    }\n811\t\n812\t    private function getStatusIds()\n813\t    {\n814\t        return [\n815\t            'pending' => DB::table('statuses')->where('name', 'pending')->first()->id,\n816\t            'registered' => DB::table('statuses')->where('name', processMultipleApprovals($userIDs, $statusIds, $approverName = 'The Dean')\n822\t    {\n823\t        $approved = [];\n824\t        $skipped = [];\n825\t\n826\t        foreach ($userIDs as $userID) {\n827\t            $user = User::find($userID);\n828\t            if (!$user || $user->status_id === $statusIds['disapproved'] || $user->status_id !== $statusIds['pending']) {\n829\t                $skipped[] = $userID;\n830\t                continue;\n831\t            }\n832\t\n833\t            $user->update([\n834\t                'status_id' => $statusIds['registered'],\n835\t                'isActive' => true\n836\t            ]);\n837\t\n838\t            // Send email notification\n839\t            $this->emailService->sendStatusNotification($user, 'approved', $approverName);\n840\t\n841\t            $approved[] = $user;\n842\t        }\n843\t\n844\t        return ['approved' => $approved, 'skipped' => $skipped];\n845\t    }\n846\t\n847\t    /**\n848\t     * Process multiple user approvals with scope validation\n849\t     * Filters users based on approver's authority and scope\n850\t     */\n851\t    private function processMultipleApprovalsWithScope($userIDs, $statusIds, $authUser, $approverInfo)\n852\t    {\n853\t        $approved = [];\n854\t        $skipped = [];\n855\t        $scopeRestricted = [];\n856\t\n857\t        foreach ($userIDs as $userID) {\n858\t            $user = User::find($userID);\n859\t            \n860\t            // Check if user exists and is pending\n861\t            if (!$user || $user->status_id !== $statusIds['pending']) {\n862\t                $skipped[] = [\n863\t                    'userID' => $userID,\n864\t                    'reason' => 'User not found or not pending'\n865\t                ];\n866\t                continue;\n867\t            }\n868\t\n869\t            // Check role hierarchy\n870\t            if (!$this->canApproveUser($authUser, $user)) {\n871\t                $skipped[] = [\n872\t                    'userID' => $userID,\n873\t                    'reason' => 'Insufficient role authority'\n874\t                ];\n875\t                continue;\n876\t            }\n877\t\n878\t            // Check scope restrictions\n879\t            if (!$this->canApproveUserInScope($authUser, $user)) {\n880\t                $scopeRestricted[] = [\n881\t                    'userID' => $userID,\n882\t                    'reason' => $this->getScopeRestrictionMessage($authUser)\n883\t                ];\n884\t                continue;\n885\t            }\n886\t\n887\t            // Approve the user\n888\t            $user->update([\n889\t                'status_id' => $statusIds['registered'],\n890\t                'isActive' => true\n891\t            ]);\n892\t\n893\t            // Send email notification with approver info\n894\t            $this->emailService->sendStatusNotification(\n895\t                $user,\n896\t                'approved',\n897\t                $approverInfo['display_name']\n898\t            );\n899\t\n900\t            $approved[] = $user;\n901\t\n902\t            Log::info('User approved in bulk', [\n903\t                'user_id' => $user->userID,\n904\t                'approver_id' => $authUser->userID,\n905\t                'approver_role' => $approverInfo['role'],\n906\t            ]);\n907\t        }\n908\t\n909\t        return [\n910\t            'approved' => $approved,\n911\t            'skipped' => $skipped,\n912\t            'scope_restricted' => $scopeRestricted\n913\t        ];\n914\t    }\n915\t\n916\t    private function validateProfileUpdate(Request $request, $user)\n917\t    {\n918\t        return $request->validate([\n919\t            'firstName' => 'sometimes|required|string|max:100',\n920\t            'lastName' => 'sometimes|required|string|max:100',\n921\t            'email' => [\n922\t                'sometimes',\n923\t                'required',\n924\t                'email',\n925\t                Rule::unique('users', 'email')->ignore($user->userID, 'userID')\n926\t            ],\n927\t            'userCode' => [\n928\t                'sometimes',\n929\t                'required',\n930\t                'string',\n931\t                'max:50',\n932\t                Rule::unique('users', 'userCode')->ignore($user->userID, 'userID')\n933\t            ],\n934\t        ]);\n935\t    }\n936\t\n937\t    private function updateUserProfile($user, $validated)\n938\t    {\n939\t        if (!$user instanceof User) {\n940\t            $eloquentUser = User::find($user->userID);\n941\t            if (!$eloquentUser) {\n942\t                throw new \\Exception('User record not found.');\n943\t            }\n944\t            foreach ($validated as $field => $value) {\n945\t                $eloquentUser->$field = $value;\n946\t            }\n947\t            $eloquentUser->save();\n948\t        } else {\n949\t            foreach ($validated as $field => $value) {\n950\t                $user->$field = $value;\n951\t            }\n952\t            $user->save();\n953\t        }\n954\t    }\n955\t\n956\t    private function handleValidationError($e)\n957\t    {\n958\t        $customErrors = [];\n959\t        if (isset($e->errors()['email'])) {\n960\t            $customErrors['email'] = ['The email is already in use by another account.'];\n961\t        }\n962\t        if (isset($e->errors()['userCode'])) {\n963\t            $customErrors['userCode'] = ['The user code is already taken.'];\n964\t        }\n965\t        return response()->json([\n966\t            'message' => 'Validation failed.',\n967\t            'errors' => count($customErrors) ? $customErrors : $e->errors()\n968\t        ], 422);\n969\t    }\n970\t\n971\t    private function getAllowedRoleChanges($roleID)\n972\t    {\n973\t        return match($roleID) {\n974\t            4 => [1, 2, 3, 4, 5], // Dean can change all roles\n975\t            5 => [1, 2, 3],      // Associate Dean can change Program Chair, Instructor, and Student\n976\t            3 => [1, 2],         // Program Chair can change Instructor and Student\n977\t            default => []\n978\t        };\n979\t    }\n980\t\n981\t    private function getApproverDisplayName($user)\n982\t    {\n983\t        $approverName = $user->firstName . ' ' . $user->lastName;\n984\t        \n985\t        // Add role and program information\n986\t        $roleNames = [\n987\t            1 => 'Student',\n988\t            2 => 'Instructor',\n989\t            3 => 'Program Chair',\n990\t            4 => 'Dean',\n991\t            5 => 'Associate Dean'\n992\t        ];\n993\t        \n994\t        $roleName = $roleNames[$user->roleID] ?? 'Administrator';\n995\t        \n996\t        // For Program Chair and Instructor, include program name\n997\t        if (in_array($user->roleID, [2, 3]) && $user->program) {\n998\t            $programName = $user->program->programName ?? '';\n999\t            return \"{$approverName} - {$programName} {$roleName}\";\n1000\t        }\n1001\t        \n1002\t        // For Dean and Associate Dean, just show role\n1003\t        if (in_array($user->roleID, [4, 5])) {\n1004\t            return $roleName;\n1005\t        }\n1006\t        \n1007\t        return $approverName;\n1008\t    }\n1009\t\n1010\t    /**\n1011\t     * Get comprehensive approver information including role, scope, and display name\n1012\t     * Provides transparency about who approved and their authority level\n1013\t     */\n1014\t    private function getApproverInfo($user)\n1015\t    {\n1016\t        $roleNames = [\n1017\t            1 => 'Student',\n1018\t            2 => 'Faculty/Instructor',\n1019\t            3 => 'Program Chair',\n1020\t            4 => 'Dean',\n1021\t            5 => 'Associate Dean'\n1022\t        ];\n1023\t        \n1024\t        $roleName = $roleNames[$user->roleID] ?? 'Administrator';\n1025\t        \n1026\t        $displayName = $user->firstName . ' ' . $user->lastName;\n1027\t        $campusName = $user->campus ? $user->campus->campusName : 'N/A';\n1028\t        $programName = $user->program ? $user->program->programName : 'N/A';\n1029\t        \n1030\t        $info = [\n1031\t            'approver_id' => $user->userID,\n1032\t            'approver_name' => $displayName,\n1033\t            'role' => $roleName,\n1034\t            'campus' => $campusName,\n1035\t            'program' => $programName,\n1036\t            'display_name' => $displayName . ' (' . $roleName . ')',\n1037\t            'scope' => $this->getApproverScope($user)\n1038\t        ];\n1039\t        \n1040\t        // Build detailed display name with scope information\n1041\t        if ($user->roleID === 4) {\n1042\t            $info['display_name'] = $displayName . ' - Dean (Full Authority)';\n1043\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 5) {\n1044\t            $info['display_name'] = $displayName . ' - Associate Dean (' . $campusName . ' Campus)';\n1045\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 3) {\n1046\t            $info['display_name'] = $displayName . ' - Program Chair (' . $programName . ')';\n1047\t        } elseif ($user->roleID === 2) {\n1048\t            $info['display_name'] = $displayName . ' - Faculty (' . $programName . ')';\n1049\t        }\n1050\t        \n1051\t        return $info;\n1052\t    }\n1053\t\n1054\t    /**\n1055\t     * Get the scope of authority for an approver\n1056\t     */\n1057\t    private function getApproverScope($user)\n1058\t    {\n1059\t        switch ($user->roleID) {\n1060\t            case 4:\n1061\t                return 'Institution-wide Authority';\n1062\t            case 5:\n1063\t                return 'Campus: ' . ($user->campus ? $user->campus->campusName : 'Unassigned');\n1064\t            case 3:\n1065\t                return 'Program: ' . ($user->program ? $user->program->programName : 'Unassigned');\n1066\t            case 2:\n1067\t                return 'Students in: ' . ($user->program ? $user->program->programName : 'Unassigned');\n1068\t            default:\n1069\t                return 'Limited Authority';\n1070\t        }\n1071\t    }\n1072\t\n1073\t    /**\n1074\t     * Check if approver can approve user within their assigned scope\n1075\t     * - Program Chairs can ONLY approve within their assigned program\n1076\t     * - Faculty can ONLY approve their own students\n1077\t     * - Deans have no scope restrictions\n1078\t     */\n1079\t    private function canApproveUserInScope($authUser, $targetUser)\n1080\t    {\n1081\t        // Dean has Please upload app-release.apk to public/apk/');\n    }\n\n    return response()->file($path, [\n        'Content-Type' => 'application/vnd.android.package-archive',\n        'Content-Disposition' => 'attachment; filename=\"CAPS.apk\"',\n        'Cache-Control' => 'no-store, no-cache',\n    ]);\n});\n```\n\n**Docker-compose volume mount:**\n```yaml\n# docker-compose.yml line 18\n- \"./Backend - Deployment/public/apk:/var/www/html/public/apk\"\n```\nThe APK file is served **statically via Apache** (no PHP routing needed for the file itself — Apache directly serves `public/apk/CAPS.apk`). 2026-05-09T10:09:12.142Z LOG: [Auto-Memory] Raw user message content: [{"tool_use_id":"call_function_6zrn4ifnz3m1_1","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# Fix: `useState is not a function` / `displayName of undefined` in Expo + React 19 + NativeWind\n2\t\n3\t## Context\n4\t\n5\tTwo errors crash the app on startup from `app/(auth)/_layout.tsx`:\n6\t\n7\t1. `TypeError: _reactNative.useState is not a function (it is undefined)` — `useState` resolves to undefined\n8\t2. `TypeError: Cannot read property 'displayName' of undefined` — in `react-native-safe-area-context` (via CSS interop)\n9\t\n10\tBoth stack traces pass through:\n11\t```\n12\t<anonymous> (node_modules/react-native-css-interop/dist/runtime/wrap-jsx.js)\n13\t```\n14\t\n15\t## Actual Root Cause\n16\t\n17\tThe hooks import in `app/(auth)/_layout.tsx` is **already correct** (line 12: `import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'`). The plan file currently in this document incorrectly diagnoses the import source.\n18\t\n19\tThe real culprit is **`react-native-css-interop`** — the CSS interop layer auto-installed by `nativewind@4`. It wraps React component functions at build time to inject \"hijack\" logic for `View`/`Text` etc. With React 19, this wrapping corrupts the component's closure scope, making `useState` (and other React exports) `undefined` at render time. The same interop layer causes the `SafeAreaProvider` `displayName` crash in the second error.\n20\t\n21\tThis is a known incompatibility: `nativewind@4` + `react-native-css-interop` + React 19 does not work reliably in Expo SDK 54 without configuration tweaks.\n22\t\n23\t## Fix\n24\t\n25\t### Step 1: Update `babel.config.js` — disable CSS interop wrapping\n26\t\n27\t**File:** `C:\\Dev\\CAPS-mobile\\FrontendMobile\\babel.config.js`\n28\t\n29\tNativeWind's babel plugin can be configured with `cssInteropMode: 'classic'` which tells the interop layer to use the classic (non-hijacking) mode. This prevents the wrap-jsx transform from breaking React 19 hooks.\n30\t\n31\t```js\n32\tmodule.exports = function (api) {\n33\t  api.cache(true);\n34\t  return {\n35\t    presets: [\n36\t      ['babel-preset-expo', { jsxImportSource: 'nativewind' }],\n37\t      'nativewind/babel',\n38\t    ],\n39\t    plugins: [\n40\t      // Disable CSS interop JSX wrapping for React 19 compatibility\n41\t      ['nativewind/babel', { cssInteropMode: 'classic' }],\n42\t    ],\n43\t  };\n44\t};\n45\t```\n46\t\n47\t### Step 2: Clear Metro cache\n48\t\n49\tAfter editing the config files, stale bundle cache must be purged:\n50\t\n51\t```bash\n52\tcd C:\\Dev\\CAPS-mobile\\FrontendMobile\n53\tnpx expo start --clear --host lan\n54\t```\n55\t\n56\t## Files to Modify\n57\t\n58\t| File | Change |\n59\t|---|---|\n60\t| `C:\\Dev\\CAPS-mobile\\FrontendMobile\\babel.config.js` | Add `cssInteropMode: 'classic'` via babel plugin override |\n61\t\n62\t## Verification\n63\t\n64\t1. Start with updating your todo list if applicable\n\nYour plan has been saved to: C:\\Users\\rober\\.claude\\plans\\how-this-project-works-memoized-otter.md\nYou can refer back to it if needed during implementation.\n\n## Approved Plan (edited by user):\n# How This Project Works & How to Set It Up\n\n## What Is MoSPAMS?\n\n**MoSPAMS** = Motorcycle Service and Parts Management System — a multi-tenant SaaS platform for motorcycle repair shops and parts retailers, built with Laravel (backend) + React (frontend).\n\n- **Production URLs:** `api.mospams.shop` (Laravel API) + `mospams.shop` (Vercel frontend)\n- **Tenancy model:** Shared database, `shop_id_fk` on every domain table. Subdomain-based tenant routing via `X-Tenant-Host` header.\n- **Auth:** Laravel Sanctum (token-based) + Google OAuth\n- **Payments:** PayMongo (Philippines payment gateway)\n- **Domains:** Custom domains per shop via Cloudflare\n\n---\n\n## Tech Stack\n\n| Layer | Technology |\n|-------|-----------|\n| Backend | PHP 8.3 / Laravel 13 |\n| Database | MySQL 8 |\n| Auth | Laravel Sanctum |\n| Frontend | React 19 + TypeScript + Vite 7 |\n| State | TanStack Query v5 |\n| Styling | TailwindCSS 3 + Radix UI |\n| Payments | PayMongo |\n| Email | Resend |\n\n---\n\n## Directory Layout\n\n```\nMoSPAMS/\n├── Backend/           # Laravel application\n│   ├── app/\n│   │   ├── Http/Controllers/Api/  # 12 API controllers\n│   │   ├── Models/                 # 28 Eloquent models\n│   │   ├── Services/               # Billing, Domain, Identity services\n│   │   ├── Support/Tenancy/       # TenantManager, TenantScope, middleware\n│   │   └── Jobs/                   # Background jobs\n│   ├── database/\n│   │   ├── migrations/    # 17+ migration files (2026-04-29 to 2026-05-09)\n│   │   └── seeders/       # 7 seeders for roles, shops, billing, production\n│   ├── config/tenancy.php  # Multi-tenancy config\n│   ├── routes/api.php      # All API routes\n│   └── Dockerfile          # Multi-stage PHP 8.3 + Nginx build\n├── Frontend/          # React + TypeScript + Vite app\n│   ├── src/\n│   │   ├── app/App.tsx         # Root router (3 host-mode branches)\n│   │   ├── features/            # auth, dashboard, inventory, services, sales,\n│   │   │                         # reports, users, mechanic, customers, superadmin\n│   │   ├── shared/\n│   │   │   ├── contexts/        # AuthContext, DataContext, TenantBrandingContext\n│   │   │   ├── hooks/           # useDashboardData, useAdminStats, etc.\n│   │   │   └── lib/api.ts       # apiGet / apiMutation helpers\n│   │   └── components/ui/       # Reusable Radix-based UI components\n│   ├── vite.config.ts            # Vite config, vendor chunk splitting\n│   └── package.json\n├── docs/              # 60+ markdown files (architecture, deployment, troubleshooting)\n├── scripts/           # PowerShell helpers (start-backend, ngrok, verify)\n└── docker-compose.yml  # MySQL + Redis + PHP app container\n```\n\n---\n\n## Key Architecture Concepts\n\n### 1. Multi-Tenancy by Subdomain\n\nThe app detects the incoming host and routes accordingly:\n\n| Host | Mode | Who |\n|------|------|-----|\n| `admin.mospams.*` | `platform` | Platform SuperAdmins |\n| `shop.mospams.*` | `tenant` | Shop Owner/Staff/Mechanic/Customer |\n| `mospams.shop` or `localhost` | `public` | Landing page visitors |\n\nEvery API request for a tenant carries `X-Tenant-Host` header. The `ResolveTenantContext` middleware reads it, loads the `Shop`, and applies `TenantScope` (global Eloquent scope) so all queries are automatically scoped to `shop_id_fk`.\n\n### 2. Enterprise Identity Model (May 2026)\n\nThe latest refactor introduced three-layer identity:\n\n- **Account** — Global identity (email + password_hash + google_id). One account can belong to multiple shops.\n- **ShopMembership** — `account_id_fk` + `shop_id_fk` + `role_id_fk`. The per-shop role assignment.\n- **User** — Per-shop user record, linked to Account. Holds the Sanctum token.\n\nThis means a person can have an Owner role in Shop A and a Customer role in Shop B with the same email/password.\n\n### 3. Role Hierarchy\n\nWithin a shop: `Owner > Staff > Mechanic > Customer`\nAt platform level: `SuperAdmin` (platform-wide, linked via `PlatformAdmin`)\n\n### 4. Frontend-Backend Communication\n\nNo Vite proxy in dev. The frontend reads `VITE_API_BASE_URL` (set at build time) and calls the Laravel API directly. Token stored in memory + localStorage. Every request sends `Bearer` token + `X-Tenant-Host` header.\n\n---\n\n## Database Core Tables\n\n**Status lookups:** `roles`, `user_statuses`, `shop_statuses`, `account_statuses`, `membership_statuses`, `part_statuses`, `category_statuses`, `service_job_statuses`, `mechanic_statuses`, `payment_statuses`\n\n**Core entities:** `accounts`, `shops`, `users`, `shop_memberships`, `customers`, `mechanics`, `parts`, `categories`, `service_types`, `service_jobs`, `service_job_mechanics`, `sales`, `payments`, `stock_movements`, `activity_logs`, `notifications`, `role_requests`\n\n**Billing:** `subscription_plans`, `shop_subscriptions`, `subscription_payments`\n\n---\n\n## How to Set It Up (Local Development)\n\n### Prerequisites\n\n- **PHP 8.3** with `pdo_mysql` extension (`php -v` and `php -m | findstr pdo_mysql`)\n- **MySQL** (Docker or local install)\n- **Node.js 20+ / npm**\n- **Composer 2**\n\n### Step 1 — Start MySQL\n\nUsing Docker (project root):\n```powershell\ndocker compose up -d db\n```\n\n> ⚠️ Docker maps MySQL to **port 3307**, not 3306 (to avoid conflicts with local MySQL). Update `DB_PORT=3307` in your `.env`.\n\n### Step 2 — Create the Database\n\n```sql\nCREATE DATABASE mospams_db CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;\n```\n\n### Step 3 — Set Up Backend\n\n```powershell\ncd Backend\ncp .env.local.example .env\nphp artisan key:generate\n# Edit .env: set DB_PORT=3307, DB_DATABASE=mospams_db, DB_USERNAME=root, DB_PASSWORD=\nphp artisan migrate --force\nphp artisan db:seed --force\n```\n\nDefault local admin account:\n- **Email:** `admin@mospams.local`\n- **Password:** `admin123`\n\n### Step 4 — Start the Backend\n\n```powershell\nphp artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8002\n```\n\nOr use the helper script (defaults to port 8002):\n```powershell\n.\\scripts\\start-backend-local.ps1\n```\n\n### Step 5 — Set Up Frontend\n\n```powershell\ncd Frontend\ncp .env.local.example .env\n# Ensure VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8002\nnpm install\nnpm run dev\n```\n\nFrontend runs at `http://localhost:5173`.\n\n---\n\n## Useful Dev Commands\n\n### Backend (from `Backend/` directory)\n\n```powershell\nphp artisan migrate:fresh --seed   # Full reset + repopulate\nphp artisan db:seed --force        # Re-seed without migrating\nphp artisan config:clear           # Clear cached config\nphp artisan route:list            # List all API routes\nphp artisan tinker                 # Interactive REPL\nphp artisan about                  # App info + env vars\n```\n\n### Frontend (from `Frontend/` directory)\n\n```powershell\nnpm run dev      # Dev server (port 5173)\nnpm run build    # Production build\n```\n\n---\n\n## Available Scripts\n\n| Script | Purpose |\n|--------|---------|\n| `scripts/start-backend-local.ps1` | Run migrations, optionally seed, start Laravel |\n| `scripts/start-fullstack-with-ngrok.ps1` | Full stack + ngrok tunnel for testing Vercel against local backend |\n| `scripts/verify-startup.ps1` | Health check the running services |\n\n---\n\n## Port Summary\n\n| Service | Port |\n|---------|------|\n| Laravel API | 8002 (default dev), 8000 (Docker) |\n| Vite frontend | 5173 |\n| MySQL (Docker) | 3307 |\n| MySQL (local) | 3306 |\n| Redis (Docker) | 6379 |\n\n---\n\n## Key Files Reference\n\n| Purpose | File |\n|---------|------|\n| Backend entry | `Backend/public/index.php` |\n| Backend bootstrap + middleware aliases | `Backend/bootstrap/app.php` |\n| Backend env template | `Backend/.env.local.example` |\n| All API routes | `Backend/routes/api.php` |\n| Multi-tenancy config | `Backend/config/tenancy.php` |\n| Frontend entry | `Frontend/src/app/main.tsx` |\n| Frontend routing by host mode | `Frontend/src/app/App.tsx` |\n| API client (fetch wrapper) | `Frontend/src/shared/lib/api.ts` |\n| Frontend env template | `Frontend/.env.local.example` |\n| Vite config (no proxy) | `Frontend/vite.config.ts` |\n| Docker compose | `docker-compose.yml` |\n| Docker multi-stage build | `Backend/Dockerfile` |\n| Project memory/architecture | `docs/PROJECT_MEMORY.md` |\n\n---\n\n## Gotchas to Watch Out For\n\n1. **MySQL port 3307 in Docker** — `.env.local.example` defaults to 3306; update it.\n2. **`VITE_API_BASE_URL` is baked at build time** — Change it, then `npm run dev` again.\n3. **`TENANCY_ENFORCEMENT_MODE=shadow`** — In dev, non-tenant requests fallback silently; in prod it's `enforce`.\n4. **No Vite proxy** — Frontend calls the API URL directly; no path rewriting.\n5. **SuperAdmin not shop-scoped** — SuperAdmin routes bypass `TenantScope` entirely.","tool_use_id":"call_function_bww5pbpm20r3_1","cache_control":{"type":"ephemeral"}}]

leaderboard\n74\t    if (path.includes('/analytics') || path.includes('/insights')) return 45000; // 45s for analytics\n75\t    return 30000; // 30s default\n76\t  };\n77\t  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), getTimeout(path));\n78\t\n79\t  // Support external AbortSignal (e.g. from a React useEffect cleanup)\n80\t  if (signal) {\n81\t    signal.addEventListener('abort', () => controller.abort(), { once: true });\n82\t  }\n83\t\n84\t  try {\n85\t    const response = await fetch(buildUrl(path), {\n86\t      method,\n87\t      headers,\n88\t      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n89\t      signal: controller.signal,\n90\t    });\n91\t    clearTimeout(timeout);\n92\t\n93\t    const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));\n94\t\n95\t    if (!response.ok) {\n96\t      if (response.status === 401) {\n97\t        await handleUnauthorized();\n98\t      }\n99\t      const error: ApiError = new Error(data.message || `Request failed (${response.status})`) as ApiError;\n100\t      error.status = response.status;\n101\t      error.data = data as Record<string, unknown>;\n102\t      throw error;\n103\t    }\n104\t\n105\t    return data;\n106\t  } catch (err) {\n107\t    clearTimeout(timeout);\n108\t    const abortError = err as { name?: string; message?: string };\n109\t    if (abortError.name === 'AbortError' || abortError.message?.includes('aborted')) {\n110\t      const timeoutError = new Error('Request timed out') as ApiError;\n111\t      timeoutError.status = 408;\n112\t      throw timeoutError;\n113\t    }\n114\t    throw err;\n115\t  }\n116\t}\n117\t\n118\texport async function apiRequest(\n119\t  path: string,\n120\t  { method = 'GET', body, auth = true, signal }: {\n121\t    method?: string;\n122\t    body?: unknown;\n123\t    auth?: boolean;\n124\t    signal?: AbortSignal;\n125\t  } = {}\n126\t) {\n127\t  const net = await NetInfo.fetch();\n128\t  const isOnline = net.isConnected ?? true;\n129\t  const key = cacheKey(method, path);\n130\t\n131\t  if (isOnline) {\n132\t    try {\n133\t      const result = await rawApiRequest(path, { method, body, auth, signal });\n134\t      if (method === 'GET') {\n135\t        // Don't cache leaderboard — filters change frequently and stale data\n136\t        // is confusing in a ranking context\n137\t        const isLeaderboard = path.includes('/leaderboard');\n138\t        if (!isLeaderboard) {\n139\t          const ttl = 5 * 60 * 1000;\n140\t          await setCachedResponse(key, result, ttl);\n141\t        }\n142\t      }\n143\t      return result;\n144\t    } catch (error: unknown) {\n145\t      const err = error as { message?: string; status?: number };\n146\t      // If the error looks like a network failure, try cache fallback for GET\n147\t      if (method === 'GET' && (err.message?.includes('Network') || (err.status ?? 0) >= 500)) {\n148\t        const cached = await getCachedResponse(key);\n149\t        if (cached !== null) {\n150\t          showToast('Showing cached data — server unreachable.', 'info');\n151\t          return cached;\n152\t        }\n153\t      }\n154\t      throw error;\n155\t    }\n156\t  }\n157\t\n158\t  // Offline handling\n159\t  if (method === 'GET') {\n160\t    const cached = await getCachedResponse(key);\n161\t    if (cached !== null) {\n162\t      return cached;\n163\t    }\n164\t    throw new Error('You are offline. This data is not available.');\n165\t  }\n166\t\n167\t  // Queue mutations for later sync\n168\t  await addToOfflineQueue({ path, method, body, auth });\n169\t  showToast('You are offline. This action will sync when you reconnect.', 'info');\n170\t  return { queued: true, message: 'Will sync when online' };\n171\t}\n172\t\n173\texport async function syncOfflineQueue(): Promise<void> {\n174\t  const queue = await getOfflineQueue();\n175\t  if (queue.length === 0) return;\n176\t\n177\t  let successCount = 0;\n178\t  let failCount = 0;\n179\t\n180\t  for (const item of queue) {\n181\t    try {\n182\t      await rawApiRequest(item.path, {\n183\t        method: item.method,\n184\t        body: item.body,\n185\t        auth: item.auth,\n186\t      });\n187\t      await removeFromOfflineQueue(item.id);\n188\t      successCount++;\n189\t    } catch {\n190\t      failCount++;\n191\t    }\n192\t  }\n193\t\n194\t  if (successCount > 0 && failCount === 0) {\n195\t    showToast('Offline changes synced successfully.', 'success');\n196\t  } else if (failCount > 0) {\n197\t    showToast(`${failCount} offline change(s) could not be synced.`, 'error');\n198\t  }\n199\t}\n200\t\n201\t// Re-export aliases used elsewhere in the codebase\n202\t"}]
